faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by Velammal Institute of Technology for admission?
faqs.answer: Velammal Institute of Technology does not conduct an entrance exam for admission into its courses. Admission to the college is purely based on TNEA (Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions) Counseling. Therefore, the institute accepts TNEA scores for admission to its BTech courses.Velammal Institute of Technology (VITech) is a premier private educational institution established in 2008. It offers undergraduate courses in engineering and technology. The admission process is based on the candidate's 10+2 score and marks obtained in the Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) counseling.

faqs.answer: A:    As per the Shiksha students' reviews, around 97% of the batch gets placement opportunities every year, and some also opt for higher students. faqs.question: What are the students' reviews on Velammal Institute of Technology campus placements?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Expecting good 100% placements.

review_content.Placements: 50% of students got placed in our department. The highest package is 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Accenture, Hexaware, etc. Data Analyst and Web Developer are the top roles offered. Codsoft are the companies that took students for internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the hostels are in good condition. The food provided is good, and nothing is bad. The labs and classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel warden is very strict and watches everything that happens in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The Importance and Focus on the Academics and Placements Category in All Departments.

review_content.Placements: Our batch 2017-2021 students were placed in top MNC companies, and the placement percentage was 98.4%. The remaining students were also provided with internship programs to enhance their skills for their future placement interviews. The salary package offered to our batch varies from 3.5 LPA to 12 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The academics was well handled by experienced faculty members, and we were also taught with real-world problem-solving skills and the present market opportunities. The hostel facilities was pretty good, and the food was also good. There are no negative opinions on this.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and infrastructure, but faculty support and academic experience need improvement.

review_content.Placements: In my batch, around 70 percent of students were placed. The highest package offered was INR 12 LPA, the lowest was INR 3 LPA and the average was INR 6 LPA. Top companies like TCS, Infosys, and Wipro recruited us. About 60 percent of students got internships, mainly at companies like Accenture and Cognizant. Common roles offered include software developer and data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good, with Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and spacious classrooms. The library has a good collection of books. In the hostel, the facilities are decent, but the food in the mess could improve. Medical facilities are available, and there are sports and games options, which are great for relation.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the teaching of faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of 9th grade students got placed on our campus; the maximum package will be around 10 LPA, according to the person. The core companies rarely visit our college. From the second year onwards, students are informed to participate in the internships with or without a stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not that good. Our campus is filled with Wi-Fi connections, even in the hostels. In the hostel, per room, 4 members were allocated, and separate cupboards were arranged. The quality of the hostel food is too good. We will have both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good and strict college and above average in placements.

review_content.Placements: In maximum 98% of students have placed in 2015-2019. The highest package is 10 LPA, average will be 4-5 LPA, the lowest will be 3LPA. Top companies are TCS, Accenture, Zoho, CTS, Sify Technologies, wipro Roles offered are Developed, Software testing, Internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities will be good, infrastructure will be small. Wi-Fi is available all the campus, And sports grounds also available. Medical facilities are available. Ambulance also available. In hostel in one room 5 members will be stayed, and food will be average, and canteen is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My college provides good placements.

review_content.Placements: 95% of the students were placed in my course. The highest package is INR 45 lakhs, and the lowest package is INR 2 lakhs. Yes, a maximum of 20 top recruiting companies will come for interviews. 80% of the students got internships from Zoho, Wipro, TVS, etc. NASA also offered roles in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are more than five labs. Rooms are bigger than enough. The library is good for taking books and well maintained with silence. Wi-Fi is available for my course. The hostel is good at my college. They offer both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options. They give more importance to sports, and medical facilities are better.

admission_process.title: Velammal Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Velammal Institute of Technology admission 2025 is merit-based for some while entrance-based for other courses. Velammal Institute of Technology offers over 23 courses at UG, PG, and PhD level in Engineering, Law, Business Administration, Nursing, Pharmacy, Arts, Science, Humanities, Allied Health Sciences, Dental Sciences, Design, and Architecture. The courses are offered through 11 schools ofSIST Chennai. The mode of application is online for all courses.

Apart from the regular degreeprogrammes, Sathyabamaalsoextends online courses at theCentre for Distance and Online Education (CDOE).Read on to know more about Velammal Institute of Technology admission.
Velammal Institute of Technology's course admission to most of the offered courses is merit-based. Candidates can check out the table below for some key highlights:
Particulars
Velammal Institute of Technology Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Offline
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
Admission Status
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Velammal Institute of Technology's admissions to most of the courses are merit-based. The university also conducts an entrance exam named Sathyabama All-India Entrance Exam (SAEEE) to shortlist the candidates for admission to the university.

For all courses, candidates are required to meet the minimum eligibility criteria to get shortlisted for any and every course offered by Velammal Institute of Technology. Check belowSIST popular coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Students who are interested in taking admission at Velammal Institute of Technology can check the points mentioned below:
Step 1: Velammal Institute of Technology Application

The admission process starts with filling out the Velammal Institute of Technology application form, followed by the merit score of eligible candidates. Interested candidates can visit the official website of Velammal Institute of Technology to apply for the course of their choice and pay the fee for the respective course.
Step 2: Velammal Institute of Technology Selection

For UG, the students need to qualify for class 12. For PG courses, a graduation in the relevant discipline is required. The students with the minimum qualifications will be eligible to register for the Sathyabama All-India Entrance Exam (SAEEE).
Step 3: Velammal Institute of Technology Admission Confirmation

Students who will qualify for the Sathyabama All-India Entrance Exam (SAEEE) will be shortlisted through the merit list released on the official website of the university. Candidates can check the merit lists through the candidate's registered login ID and password. the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay aVIT course feeto confirm their seat in the college.

courses_data.description: The BTech course of Velammal Institute of Technology is a full-time undergraduate program under the different specializations. BTech admissions are made on the basis of merit through the Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) counselling procedure. Candidates need to have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as compulsory subjects.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to the BTech programme at Velammal Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: For gaining admission to the BTech course at Velammal Institute of Technology, students have to apply on the TNEA official website and undergo counselling. Eligibility is for having passed Class 12 with PCM subjects and attaining the minimum percentage required. Selection is purely merit-based, taking into account TNEA cutoff ranks.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech admission at Velammal Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Velammal Institute of Technology demands that candidates pass Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics. General students must obtain a minimum of 45% aggregate marks, whereas reserved category candidates require 40%. Age should be 17 years or more at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Does Velammal Institute of Technology offer different BTech specialisations?
faqs.answer: Yes, Velammal Institute of Technology provides BTech in various specialisations like Computer Science, Electronics and Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering. These courses are planned to offer theoretical education as well as practical exposure in the respective field. Specialisation options are based on TNEA seat allotment.

courses_data.name: Velammal Institute of Technology MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Velammal Institute of Technology offers a two-year full-time MTech course at the postgraduate level. The MTech course is offered across various specialisations. They accept students on the basis of marks secured in the CEETA PG or GATE entrance exams. Applicants must have a bachelor's degree in the concerned B.E./B.Tech with a 50% aggregate percentage (45% for reserved categories).

faqs.question: How can I get admission to the M.Tech programme at Velammal Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: In order to gain entry into the M.Tech programme at Velammal Institute of Technology, students must either apply through the CEETA PG counselling website or submit GATE scores. Candidates are shortlisted on the basis of entrance exam performance and academic records. Shortlisted students are called for document verification and payment of fees.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for M.Tech admission at Velammal Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Applicants for M.Tech admission in Velammal Institute of Technology should have a B.E./B.Tech degree in the respective field. At least 50% aggregate for general category and 45% for reserved category students is mandatory. They should also pass CEETA PG or GATE.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by Velammal Institute of Technology for admission?
faqs.answer: Velammal Institute of Technology does not conduct an entrance exam for admission into its courses. Admission to the college is purely based on TNEA (Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions) Counseling. Therefore, the institute accepts TNEA scores for admission to its BTech courses.Velammal Institute of Technology (VITech) is a premier private educational institution established in 2008. It offers undergraduate courses in engineering and technology. The admission process is based on the candidate's 10+2 score and marks obtained in the Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) counseling.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good, with Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and spacious classrooms. The library has a good collection of books. In the hostel, the facilities are decent, but the food in the mess could improve. Medical facilities are available, and there are sports and games options, which are great for relation.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the teaching of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not that good. Our campus is filled with Wi-Fi connections, even in the hostels. In the hostel, per room, 4 members were allocated, and separate cupboards were arranged. The quality of the hostel food is too good. We will have both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options.

reviews.review_heading: Good and strict college and above average in placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities will be good, infrastructure will be small. Wi-Fi is available all the campus, And sports grounds also available. Medical facilities are available. Ambulance also available. In hostel in one room 5 members will be stayed, and food will be average, and canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: My college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: There are more than five labs. Rooms are bigger than enough. The library is good for taking books and well maintained with silence. Wi-Fi is available for my course. The hostel is good at my college. They offer both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options. They give more importance to sports, and medical facilities are better.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the campus.
reviews.review_text: The syllabus is provided by Anna University. The course structure of every branch focuses on students' future. The hostel rooms are very small. Around 4 students should stay in each room.

reviews.review_heading: It is good college for placements.
reviews.review_text: Labs are the best and neatly maintained. Our college is occupied in less area. Hostel infrastructure is average and serves average food. Library and classrooms are above average. Sports are average in our college but conduct matches.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is one of the top colleges in Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best infrastructure and facilities. Our college provides the best classrooms and lab facilities. Our college has one of the best hostel and mess facilities. The library has a neat and good collection of books and journals. Our college is very good at sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place to learn the engineering course, but it is not fun-filled as you see in movies.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. The infrastructure of our college is somewhat good, but mostly it is lacking. It needs improvement in many new instruments. The library and classrooms are well lit and spacious. A mess is good. It gives importance to sports and games. There is an ambulance standing by on the college premises for any emergency.

reviews.review_heading: The teaching is good placement training is provided for the students.
reviews.review_text: The lab, department and classroom are spacious and with good working conditions. Classrooms are provided with projector. The medical facilities were good provided with a medical room and the college provides a hospital in the campus. Food taste is good.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are excellent here.
reviews.review_text: There are more labs in our college, and they are clean with all the accessories. The libraries will have both books and the internet to use.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides great knowledge in our field.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our college were good. We had Wi-Fi connection in the library and classrooms. The quality of food served is good with reasonable amount fixed for the product. Playground was there for relaxation even in college hours. Studets were allowed for games weekly once of all the branches.

reviews.review_heading: Very much satisfied with the faculty members and the placements.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are spacious and have proper ventilation facilities. Our library is maintained with utmost perfection and had books that are needed for the students. Our college hostel has all the basic facilities required by the students. It has a very good canteen, efficient ground for the sports activities of the students. Students who are injured or not feeling well are treated properly by the doctors in our college. Sports are given utmost importance and all the students are well motivated b...

reviews.review_heading: Clean and tidy classrooms and well-equipped labs.
reviews.review_text:
Clean and tidy classrooms, well-equipped labs.
Library has all subject related books, even up-to-date journals and newspaper and also internet to search information. Good quality of food, medical facilities and big ground for all varieties of sports .

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Zoho, Amazon, Wipro, Cognizant, Infosys, Kaar, etc., visited our college.
From first year onwards our institute give placement training like skillrack which help to improve the students knowledge in aptitude and coding.

college_info.college_name: Velammal Institute of Technology Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, there are scholarships for BC and MBC category students offered by Velammal Institute of Technology under the BC/MBC scholarship scheme. The student's family income in a year should be less than INR 50,000 to be eligible. These scholarships are given to make quality education easier for backward community students.

Velammal Institute of Technology offers several scholarships to SC/ST students, including the Government of India Post-Matric Scholarship, Gandhi Memorial Scholarship, and Adhoc Merit Grant. These aim at benefiting weaker financial students while encouraging academic progress. Eligibility can be based on a family income level of below INR 50,000 or on minimum academic percentage.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at Glocal University?
overview_faqs.answer: Glocal University offers BSc and BSc (Hons) in nine and three specialisations, respectively. All the programmes are offered in a full-time mode for a course duration of three to four years. The total tuition fee for the BSc course ranges from INR 1.77 Lacs to INR 3.20 lakh. For admission to the BSc programme, the final selection for all these programmes is based on meeting the minimum eligibility criteria. The minimum eligibility criteria is that the candidate must have passed Class 12 from a recognised board.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (B.A.M.S.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My personal opinion about my college, its infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: Currently, I am studying here, so I don't have any idea about the placement, but after asking my friends, they said that last year, 30 students out of 70 students got placement from our college. Many companies visited our college, like Patanjali and Infosys. All the students who got passed out from our college get internships in so many hospitals in India. I don't know about the top roles offered in our college.
content.Infrastructure: There are all facilities available in our college like Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, a library, everything is fit and fine. Students really enjoy studying here. Hostels are very good. Students get tables and chairs for self-study and a comfortable B.Ed for good sleep, but the food in the mess during summers is very bad. They give the same food for days, so students get bored eating the same food. In winters, the food is good enough to eat. Sports also happen in our college like cricket, volleyball, kabbadi, badminton, basketball, etc.

admission_overview.college_name: Glocal University Course Admissions 2025: Applications, Eligibility, Selection Process, Fee, Dates

admission_process.title: Glocal University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Glocal University admission 2025are both merit and entrance-based. The University offers around 80 courses at UG, PG, diploma, advance diploma and doctoral level under 14 different schools in the field of Management, Law, Engineering, Agriculture, Pharmacy, Arts, Commerce and many more. All the courses offered by the University are in full-time mode. Candidates are required to follow the specified admission process to get a chance at securing a seat in their desired programme.Glocal Universityadmission process for the session 2025-26 is ongoing.

Glocal University offers admission to UG and PG courses based on merit or national or state-level entrance exam scores. The university offers full-time courses for interested candidates. There are more than 80 courses incluing specialisations for candidates to choose from. Candidates can learn more about the university through the highlights table given below:
Particulars
Glocal University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
https://glocaluniversity.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Admission to Glocal University's undergraduate and graduate programmes is determined by merit and results on the entrance exam for different course. Additionally, Glocal University administers entrance exams for MBA, LLM, and other course admissions. Class 12 is the minimum requirement for UG courses, whereas graduation is necessary to apply for PG programs.

The Glocal University entrance exam is used to select students for well-known programs like MBA and LLM. The eligibility and selection criteria for a few of theGlocal University coursesare listed in the table below:
Note:The information for the courses is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change

The whole cost of attending Glocal University includes several parts, including tuition, a caution deposit, test fees, and more. Tuition is paid annually, while other fee components, such as the caution deposit, are paid just once. Candidates are required to pay theGlocal University feethrough the means that have been made available. Check out the fee table given below:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The admissions procedure at Glocal University consists of several steps. Applicants must first submit an application for the course of their choice. The university's official website offers the application form online. Admission to courses at Glocal University is determined by entrance and merit. The detailed admissions procedure for Glocal University is described below:
Step 1: Glocal University Application Process 2025

Candidates fulfilling the eligibility requirements can apply online for Glocal University admission. As per the information collected, the application fee must be paid to register for a course. Candidates need to fill out the form and upload the specified documents to complete the application process.
Step 2: Selection Process

Glocal University shortlists candidates for most of the courses based on the merit of the candidate; they are required to appear for entrance exams for a few courses. The university considers academic merit for admission to courses like MA, PG Diploma, etc. The first level of selection after the application process will be either based on the entrance exam or academic merit.
Step 3: Document Verification and Fee Payment

Glocal University announces the names of the shortlisted candidates on a merit list following the conclusion of the selection rounds. These applicants are also contacted for document verification and counseling. To guarantee their spot at the university, applicants must pay the Glocal University fee.

placement_data.title: Glocal University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to Glocal University NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year and UG 4-year placements 2023 stood at INR 4.15 LPA and INR 5.25 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 5.5 LPA. Apart from this, companies such as Medanta, Laborate Pharmaceuticals India Ltd and Collabra Technology visited the campus in recent past during Glocal University placements.

reviews.review_text:
1) Good and big classrooms, nice infrastructure, good labs, good library. 
2) Hostel facility is very good. Quality of food is very good, medical facility available. Sports facility available cricket, football and many other games were played in the University.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent faculty members but poor management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good, but it needs to be developed. Our college provides decent Wi-Fi facilities. Classrooms and labs are well-equipped. The library was well-stocked only for some departments. The food offered in the mess and canteens was decent. A full-fledged hospital is also available on the campus. Sports facilities were average.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the campus and teachers, but not with the students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available everywhere in the college. Labs are open till 8 pm for the students to carry out research work. Most of the tools are available in labs. All PCs have proper specifications like 8 GB RAM, i5 processors, etc. Quality of food is very good, and it is of less cost. Hostel rooms were fully air-conditioned. I haven't faced any problems during my tenure.

college_info.college_name: Glocal University

data.description: The university is equipped with fully furnished separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. The hostels are specially designed with two primary objectives of safety and comfort. It has round-the-clock security, stringent security procedures and comfortable apartments that our students enjoy living in. The hostels have state-of-the-art washrooms (toilet and bathing cells). Cleanliness is maintained by the staff on duty. Each hostel room provides an amiable atmosphere and pollution-free environment, conducive to the mental, physical and spiritual development of the students and helps them become self-reliant. Each Hostel (separate for boys and girls) in the university is self-contained with amenities such as a reading room, an indoor games room, a lounge and a dining hall with a mess.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good with a lush green campus. All the hostels and mess are fully maintained in terms of water supply, electricity, and Wi-Fi facilities. All classrooms, LT, and labs are in good condition. There are many facilities on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: The best thing about our college is my friends in BE.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good with a lush green campus. All the hostels and mess are fully maintained in terms of water supply, electricity, and Wi-Fi facility. All classrooms, LTs, and labs are in good condition. The college is very good, and the infrastructure is also commendable. The faculty are supportive. All classrooms are cleaned. The laboratory facilities and sports facilities are excellent. The canteen provides hygienic food.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and nice place .
reviews.review_text: Yes, there is availability of wi-fi, labs, other classrooms, a library with central AC, a sports complex with games and a canteen. All the basic infrastructure and all the needs are present, which is enough for any college student to study. The library has full access to Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment and peaceful way of learning .
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good lab facilities and their infrastructure are excellent to learn and they can provide 24-hour library facility in a good environment. Classes are a clean and modern system to learn and they teach on smart boards with a practical view of the subject .

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and good environment for studying.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and mess for marine cadets is seperate from other department and providing good quality food. Free Wi-Fi is available in hostel, classrooms and library for study purpose. In our college the sports and games have major importance as well as studies and dispensary is available. Library is opened 24*7.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with placements and improves your skills.
reviews.review_text: In all the sections of our department and other departments, free Wi-Fi facility is available. Classrooms are natural around the college and we also have CAD, thermal, and Kinematics. Lab facilities are available, and the library is very peaceful and available for all departments with local and foreign author books. Gents and ladies hostels are available and food served is excellent. Canteen snacks are also good. First-aid facility is provided.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Tirunelveli.
reviews.review_text: Every department had various labs, and classrooms are very basic and normal. There is the main library, and every department has Wi-Fi. Hostel rooms are below average. Mess food is not that bad, but it is average to eat. There are four canteens with varieties of food and snacks to eat. They had a dispensary with 2 staff members, a nurse and a doctor. Our college gives more importance to sports and games, and they have a volleyball court, football ground, kabaddi ground, basketball ground, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Level of education is not good in the college. There are many problems in this college.
reviews.review_text: The college has good LAN connection in every room of hostel which gives downloading speed upto 3mpbs. As an institute it has computer labs, physics and electronics lab. The college has a well maintained the library and is open all day is long. Food in the hostels is not very good but not that bad.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the management and the faculty's teaching methods.
reviews.review_text: They have only one big building. There is no Wi-Fi facility. There is no playground also. The mess is average, and the food is some unhygienic. There are some restrictions on extracurricular activities. The classrooms are also spoiled if there is rain as the rain comes into the classroom.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure include a computer lab, Wi-Fi, and smart classrooms. The campus has normal-speed Wi-Fi and a high-speed library. Food facilities are good, and there are medical facilities on campus, with a medical compounder available and ambulance service provided. Sports facilities include both indoor and outdoor games, along with a strict gym policy.

reviews.review_heading: Psn college of engineering and technology .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good there is 2 to 3 canteens in college, food is healthy and tasty, the rate of food is good, I am not hostel but hostel is good, yea there is free Wi-Fi, library is very good, there is a lot of books in library, yes there is sports, sports are good, medical facilities is there .

On the other hand, at the PG level, the Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology offers M.E./M.Tech and MCA. The fees for Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology courses range between INR 17,815 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, MCA, M.E./M.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology are Civil Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Structural Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

reviews_list.review_title: I'm absolutely satisfied with this nice college campus and rules are very good.

review_content.Placements: In Thanthai Periyar government institute of technology placements, large companies are hiring like Zoho, HCL, Facililo, etc. with high salary packages, and last year we got 80 percent of students placed. Placement teaching is very good in this college and they conduct mock interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, girls hostel infrastructure is good but rules are very bad. Boys hostel infrastructure is good and rules are also good. Food does not meet your expected level. Otherwise, inside the hostel, you have a very enjoyable time, and a study gym is available inside the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Not satisfied with the teaching quality and placements.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement in my college and only a few students are getting placement in some walk-in interviews and some people are left out without any job. The top companies that recruit students are TCS, TATA, Cognizant, Infosys, etc. The students often work as Machines learning engineer, data scientists, etc. The highest package was around 7 LPA, the average salary was around 3–4 LPA and the lowest salary was around 2 LPA. No student got an internship at my college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college does not have a Wi-Fi facility, the labs do not have proper configurations and the classrooms are not maintained properly. The library is just for name sake and only a few books are available in it. The hostel is considered to be worse and there is no proper food available in the mess either. The college does not give much importance to sports.

review_summary.college_name: Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Place to gain talent. Not only in studies.

content.Placements: The placements before 2023 were good, and the students attended lots of companies. But after 2023, there were not many companies to select the students. Recently, I attended one company; they selected only a few students for the final round and only 3 students for the company.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel's infrastructure is good, and they maintain it cleanly. Hostel staffs are friendly to us, and there is a good drinking water supply. There are totally three hostels for boys and two hostels for girls. Taste-wise, it is good for the girls' hostel compared with the boys'.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Definitely Useful for Low-Capital Family Students.

content.Placements: I'm a student of BE Mechanical Engineering in this college of the year 2023-2027. There are 120 seats for this course, and companies like Tata, Mahindra, and other core companies are recruiting here. Placements are also happening at the end of the semester, and 90% of mechanical students were placed in the last placement.
content.Infrastructure: Of course, the infrastructure of the college is a little poor when compared to some other colleges, but it's totally fine anyway. Even the hostel infrastructure is a little okay for the 1st-year students. The mess food is below average, and sports and games are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I'm absolutely satisfied with this nice college campus and rules are very good.

content.Placements: In Thanthai Periyar government institute of technology placements, large companies are hiring like Zoho, HCL, Facililo, etc. with high salary packages, and last year we got 80 percent of students placed. Placement teaching is very good in this college and they conduct mock interviews.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, girls hostel infrastructure is good but rules are very bad. Boys hostel infrastructure is good and rules are also good. Food does not meet your expected level. Otherwise, inside the hostel, you have a very enjoyable time, and a study gym is available inside the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied with the teaching quality and placements.

content.Placements: There is no placement in my college and only a few students are getting placement in some walk-in interviews and some people are left out without any job. The top companies that recruit students are TCS, TATA, Cognizant, Infosys, etc. The students often work as Machines learning engineer, data scientists, etc. The highest package was around 7 LPA, the average salary was around 3–4 LPA and the lowest salary was around 2 LPA. No student got an internship at my college.
content.Infrastructure: The college does not have a Wi-Fi facility, the labs do not have proper configurations and the classrooms are not maintained properly. The library is just for name sake and only a few books are available in it. The hostel is considered to be worse and there is no proper food available in the mess either. The college does not give much importance to sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Not so satisfied with the infrastructure and placement.

content.Placements: Only 50–60% of the students got placed in top companies and there is no placement support on campus, so only the students themselves should search for opportunities. As per a few alumni reports, most of the students got placed at TATA, Adani, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Siemens, and so on. The top roles offered were Control Engineer, Power System Engineer, Research and Development engineer, etc. The highest salary offered was around 8 LPA, the average salary offered was 3-5 LPA, and the lowest package offered was 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: It does not have any Wi-Fi facilities and the labs are also not well maintained. The classrooms are average, and the library is stocked with some major text books. The hostel is the worst and the food offered there is completely worse than that and the canteen does not have a variety of food items. There are few basic medical facilities available on campus and a few playgrounds are available for hostel students.

paragraphs: Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering and IT and Software.Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asCEETA, TANCET, and TNEA. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 17,815 - 2,00,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

cut_off.college_name: Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology Cutoff 2025: Check TANCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 for admission to the BE/BTech program at the undergraduate level has been released. The cutoff list is out for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. Candidates can check out the exam-wise section below to get an idea of the Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology TANCET cutoff 2025 is out for admission to the MCA course. The Round 1 cutoff for MCA admission is 1649 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 2466; whereas in 2023, the cutoff rank stood at 1099 for the General AI quota. Comparing the latest year's first-round cutoff with the past two years, a fluctuating trend can be seen for MCA admission.

Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology MCA cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The cutoff was released across different categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the TANCET first-round cutoff Rank stood at 1649 for MCA admission.

Among the OBC category students, the TANCET 2025 cutoff for admission to the MCA course is 2648 under the AI quota. To view the cutoff details for other categories and rounds, aspirants can use the provided filters:

Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology accepts the Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test (TANCET) ranks, followed by a counselling process for admitting students to the MBA course. Candidates interested in taking admission to this institute must refer to the table below to check out the TANCET 2025 important dates to be eligible for admission.

Tamil Nadu Common Entrance Test (TANCET) is a state-level entrance test for MBA and MCA courses in the colleges of Tamil Nadu. Candidates with a valid TANCET Rank are only eligible to appear in the counselling process. From the table below, students can view or download the round- and year-wise TANCET cutoff lists for Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology.

Students can view the Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 13951.

The hostel is the worst and the food offered there is completely worse than that and the canteen does not have a variety of food items. reviews.review_heading: Very good college and experienced faculties.
reviews.review_text: Hostel has 4 cots and 2 fans 2 tables and 2 chair in each room. Bathroom will be cleaned daily. Nearby hostel there is well so no problem for water.24/7 Water facilities available and 24/7 Purified Drinking water available. Food cost they charge for me 58/per day. Food taste will be okay.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for all the students.
reviews.review_text: EEE is a newly started department in this college so it lacks the required instruments in the labs. The government is now sanctioning funds for new equipment to upgrade great infrastructure. It doesn't have an open ground. An indoor stadium is being built for the indoor games. Girls get hostel accommodation throughout the course, but boys get hostel accommodation only for 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best choice for your career.
reviews.review_text: The library is well-equipped. There are separate hostels for both boys and girls. Playground is available to play football, kabaddi, volleyball, tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are comfortable. Our college provides us with all facilities like a library, labs, etc. The food served in the mess is good. They are improving sports and games. Our college has won many prizes this year.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The campus is well-maintained. The infrastructure is good. The library is well-stocked with books from which students can obtain information. Our college hostels are well maintained. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Projectors are available in classrooms, which help students understand concepts easily.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good with the atmosphere and it is surrounded by trees. Wi-Fi is not enough to study. Library is good with many books. Hostel facilities are not good. The quality and taste of food are not up to the mark. Classrooms are neat and clean. Students can enjoy rain inside the hostel room during the rainy season.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend you to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The food served at the hostel is not good. The hostel is old. There are issues with water. Wi-Fi is available, but not enough for our studies. Sports and games are played. There is no one to train students. The library is good. It has many books.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Thanthai Periyar Government Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. Wi-Fi is available, but the data is limited. It is not sufficient to browse. The food in the hostel is not good. I can still remember the old fan in our room, which would fall on our heads at any time. There are more mosquitos and bugs.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have a good environment. We have access to a lot of equipment in labs. Wi-Fi is available for study purposes only, and other websites are blocked. The hostel is good, and the food served at the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good. The College campus is excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and lab facility is good. The civil department building is good. Our college is one of the old colleges. I could remember the old fan in my hostel, which was too noisy and likely to fall at any time. We have got a vast library and labs.

Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM. The School of Management Sciences course fee ranges between INR 42,000 to 2,44,800.

faqs.answer: A:    School of Management Sciences has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityBCACandidates must have completed 10+2 Only in Science/Math stream are eligible to apply.B.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed minimum 3 years Diploma examination with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST category) from an institution recognized by BTEUP subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted are also eligible to apply.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10th examination with a minimum of 35% marks from a recognized board/Institute. The minimum age is 14 years, i.e. born on or before 01-07-2009.MBA/PGDMCandidate with grace marks are not allowed for admission. Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.B.VocResult awaited students can also apply on provisional basis.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by School of Management Sciences are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at School of Management Sciences goes up to 1130.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: placement was good. Almost all students got placed as DTs for 1 year but not permanently in company.

review_content.Placements: All students were placed. The highest average salary was Rs.14,000 per month. Bajaj Motors, Force India Limited, and Motherson Sumi Systems were the hiring companies. Almost all students were placed as DTs, but only for 1 year, which was very disappointing. After 1 year, all the companies fired you.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were very good. The hostel was good, but the food was not good at all. The canteen was not good, but the Mother Dairy branch was good. A medical facility was not available. Sports and games were played on campus. The sports facility was good. Everything was good about the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is good, and faculty members are great.

review_content.Placements: SMS Lucknow provides in-campus placements. The highest package is 19 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Havells, etc. On average, 70% of students get internships, and the top role offered by companies is Executive Manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college has a nice infrastructure with all the facilities. You can take AC or non-AC rooms, both available in the hostel. Classrooms are not very big for this course, with an average of 60 students per class. All labs are available, and there is a mess for hostellers, along with two canteens also available. In the first year, no sports are available, but after that, you can participate in any game, like cricket, basketball, football, volleyball, etc.

review_summary.college_name: School of Management Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with events. The crowd of students of this college is educated.

content.Placements: Placements are average and not that good as the fee is low so the placement package also depends on students and how skilled they are to get good placement. We do not get many internship opportunities and even low internships are available from college. Placements are average as many students get placements.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are average. The library is below average. The hostel is very bad and not hygienic. It does not focus on cleanliness.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good, but they do not have much knowledge as some teachers prepare notes to teach. I am not making anyone down but some teachers don't know how to speak proper English. Semester exams are moderate as it is not too difficult to pass. Students can pass easily by studying one day before exams. They do not know how to speak proper English as they always talk in Hindi. Only some teachers are good in English and are knowledgeable.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely worth it to study in this college.

content.Placements: SMS Lucknow College has a good placement record, with various companies visiting the campus for recruitment. 70% to 80% of students get placed every year, with some reviews mentioning 50% to 85% placement rates.
content.Infrastructure: The course here is worth it. Teachers try very hard to teach students. They are so supportive regarding everything. Hostel facilities are not very good. Hostel rules are very strict. Starting in the hostel is not recommended. You will also not find any other option for staying, as SMS is quite far from the rush area of Lucknow.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: placement was good. Almost all students got placed as DTs for 1 year but not permanently in company.

content.Placements: All students were placed. The highest average salary was Rs.14,000 per month. Bajaj Motors, Force India Limited, and Motherson Sumi Systems were the hiring companies. Almost all students were placed as DTs, but only for 1 year, which was very disappointing. After 1 year, all the companies fired you.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were very good. The hostel was good, but the food was not good at all. The canteen was not good, but the Mother Dairy branch was good. A medical facility was not available. Sports and games were played on campus. The sports facility was good. Everything was good about the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good, and faculty members are great.

content.Placements: SMS Lucknow provides in-campus placements. The highest package is 19 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Havells, etc. On average, 70% of students get internships, and the top role offered by companies is Executive Manager.
content.Infrastructure: This college has a nice infrastructure with all the facilities. You can take AC or non-AC rooms, both available in the hostel. Classrooms are not very big for this course, with an average of 60 students per class. All labs are available, and there is a mess for hostellers, along with two canteens also available. In the first year, no sports are available, but after that, you can participate in any game, like cricket, basketball, football, volleyball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of School of Management Sciences.

content.Placements: In my college, the placement opportunities are not as good as they claim. While they have strong placements for MBA, BBA, and management courses, the situation is not the same for B.Tech. They placed me with an MNC, but the company did not onboard me. Additionally, the college took no action regarding this issue.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The location is very much approachable as well as easily public transport is available. They have playground for cricket, football and green campus area with two cafeteria as well as a gym availability only for those living in hostel.

description: School of Management Sciences cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about School of Management Sciences UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The School of Management Sciences cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the School of Management Sciences BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 778353 and 1366093 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering.

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 778353 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 714162 in 2023.

School of Management Sciences accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to School of Management Sciences can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

School of Management Sciences JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for School of Management Sciences.

As the School of Management Sciences UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at School of Management Sciences.
During last round B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) proved to be the toughest for this category, with the closing cutoff

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), followed by B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering, and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (IOT), with the closing ranks of , and , respec

A medical facility was not available. Sports and games were played on campus. The sports facility was good. Everything was good about the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and faculty members are great.
reviews.review_text: This college has a nice infrastructure with all the facilities. You can take AC or non-AC rooms, both available in the hostel. Classrooms are not very big for this course, with an average of 60 students per class. All labs are available, and there is a mess for hostellers, along with two canteens also available. In the first year, no sports are available, but after that, you can participate in any game, like cricket, basketball, football, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of School of Management Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The location is very much approachable as well as easily public transport is available. They have playground for cricket, football and green campus area with two cafeteria as well as a gym availability only for those living in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good course and nice infrastructure but placements are not very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The hostel is okay. The food of the hostel is not very good. The canteen food is also not very good. Medical facilities are good. You won't find much variety of food in the canteen. The price is also comparatively high.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides 100% placement and has highly skillful teachers.
reviews.review_text: The staff of this college are highly skillful and knowledgeable. This college has smart boards, projectors, a library, and computer labs available for better studies. Canteen and Mother Dairy are available for recess time. The hostel provides washing machines, geysers, 1-sharing, 2-sharing, and 3-sharing rooms. Four meals are provided with decent taste.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides 100% placement and has highly skilled teachers.
reviews.review_text: The staff of this college are highly skilled and knowledgeable. This college has smart boards, projectors, a library, and computer labs available for better studies. Canteen and Mother Dairy are available for recess time. The hostel provides washing machines, geysers, 1-sharing, 2-sharing, and 3-sharing rooms. Four meals are provided with decent taste.

reviews.review_heading: The college is the best with good infrastructure, best placements, and good internships.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are the best. Wi-Fi is available 24/7. The hostel also provides geysers, washing machines, and single and double rooms, as well as an indoor games hall. The mess and canteen are available in college and provide four meals of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and highly educated teachers.
reviews.review_text: In SMS Lucknow, every class have smart boards and presentation board. Computer lab and library are available. For recess time the Canteen and mother dairy are available. For sick students medical facilities is available. For outdoor games the play ground is available and for indoor games the hall is available like table tennis, chess, carrom board, etc. In hostel, there is Wi-Fi, double sharing and triple sharing room, washing machines,  4 time meal, playground, are available.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and best faculty.
reviews.review_text: There are lots of facilities very good infrastructure with wifi and all labs like chemistry lab, programming lab, English language lab, computer lab, workshop, and electronic and electrical lab. Nice classroom with big windows for good air flow and an outstanding library that provides all books and nice sitting space without disturbance are there.

reviews.review_heading: All information about my college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in classrooms but does not work properly. There is also a library from which students can issue books. All classrooms are equipped with projectors for studying. The hostel facility is good, but the mess food is not so good. Extracurricular activities are also held on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and professors of the college are the best.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is very good for girls and boys. All students get an allotment in a hostel if they want. The hostel room is very good. And well-furnished for students. Here, a single room is provided for a student. The whole hostel and college area is equipped with Wi-Fi. And the meal quality is good for students. The price for a meal is INR 40 per plate. Students can get a diet two times a day. The menu is good. It changes according to the student. The daily meal is changed after a day. For...

reviews.review_heading: School dress should be changed and it should be a normal dress.
reviews.review_text:
The college has almost all imported equipment.
But class rooms have no AC and no good computer system. The teacher's behavior is very rude, sometimes resulting in abuse in class. Mess food is also very poor; no medical facilities are available. There must also be a counselor in college.

reviews.review_heading: Review for SMS college Lucknow .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite Majestic and the different course building are named after indian river, s. The food provided in the hostel, is not on the level of raise worthiness. The building are regularly cleaned and are maintained.

review_summary.college_name: JNTUH College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Digital Systems and Computer Electronics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A good college for M.Tech with scholarship support and facilities.

content.Placements: 60-70% of students in my batch got placed through campus placements. The highest salary offered is around 6 LPA, the lowest salary is about 2 LPA, and the average salary is nearly 3 LPA. Top companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and Tech Mahindra visited the campus. Many students also got internships in IT companies. Most students are selected for roles such as software engineer, system engineer, trainee engineer, and technical support.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities in JNTU Jagtial College are good and comfortable. Rooms are spacious, clean, and well-ventilated, with regular water and electricity supply. Hostel environment is safe and disciplined, which is helpful for studies. The mess food is hygienic and satisfactory. The canteen is useful for daily needs. Medical support is available, and students have access to sports and recreational facilities, making hostel life comfortable and pleasant.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the good environment around the campus. It has qualified faculty.

content.Placements: We have 60-70 students in each class. At least 50% of students get placed in good companies. The highest package offered is approximately 50 LPA. The average package offered is 13 LPA. The lowest package offered is 6 LPA in our branch.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are maintained neatly. If we are interested in any other activities like games or sports, then we can join as per our interest, and it will provide the equipment. Medical facilities are also available.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The quality of our teaching staff members is comparatively good. The course curriculum of our department makes students industry-ready. It is not that difficult to pass examinations if we study and examine subjects regularly. We have experienced faculty members in our department.

Labs are well-equipped and air-conditioned. The library is good. Wi-Fi facility is also available. The hotel facilities are good, and the canteen is also available.

individual_reviews.title: Comprehensive review of JNTUHUCEJ.

description: JNTUH College of Engineering Jagtial, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to various courses at the UG & PG levels. To check the cutoff details for different exams, rounds and categories, refer to the sections provided below. Candidates can check this page to view the JNTUH College of Engineering Jagtial, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad TS EAMCET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs across various rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

JNTUH College of Engineering Jagtial, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 12619 and 45896 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.Tech. in Information Technology, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 12619, 19323 and 20725, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to JNTUH College of Engineering Jagtial, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

hostel_campus.college_name: JNTUH College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: A good college for M.Tech with scholarship support and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities in JNTU Jagtial College are good and comfortable. Rooms are spacious, clean, and well-ventilated, with regular water and electricity supply. Hostel environment is safe and disciplined, which is helpful for studies. The mess food is hygienic and satisfactory. The canteen is useful for daily needs. Medical support is available, and students have access to sports and recreational facilities, making hostel life comfortable and pleasant.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the good environment around the campus. It has qualified faculty.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are maintained neatly. If we are interested in any other activities like games or sports, then we can join as per our interest, and it will provide the equipment. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The teaching faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure and facilities are nice. Classrooms are big with comfortable benches. Fans, desks, and seats in our college are good. Labs are well-equipped and air-conditioned. The library is good. Wi-Fi facility is also available. The hotel facilities are good, and the canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Peaceful campus with decent facilities and supportive teachers, but needs practical improvements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are very good and provide good environment for students. We have good classrooms and well-equipped labs. There is a big library for studies. Good and quality facilities in hostel with mess, canteen, sports, and games.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive review of JNTUHUCEJ.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is good. In our college, we have a lot of facilities like a lab, a digital library, a library, etc. Wi-Fi is provided by the campus for students. The quality of the food is not very good as much as expected. Sometimes, the food will be good. We have facilities for playing sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: A comprehensive review of JNTUHUCEJ.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. We have a lot of facilities to utilise like labs, a digital library, classrooms, etc. The hostel food is not as good as expected. We have a small canteen and medical facilities. If anything happens to students then they get treatment there.

reviews.review_heading: The comprehensive review of JNTUHUCEJ.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in our college. The infrastructure of the college is also good. We have a lot of facilities to use like a lab, library, etc. We also have Wi-Fi in the college and hostel. There is a small dispensary, canteen, sports ground, etc.

reviews.review_heading: JNTUHU College of Engineering Jagitial review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in this college. Labs are conducted according to the schedule, and we have the library facility. We can use the library from 8 am to 8 pm on working days, and on holidays this will last from 10 am to 5 pm, and it is closed on official holidays.

reviews.review_heading: Really a good college for hardworking students.
reviews.review_text: The labs and infrastructure of the college are very good. The equipment in the lab is also good. Wi-Fi is provided in the computer lab and library. Wi-Fi is also provided in the hostel TV hall. The facilities in the hostel, like geysers and maintenance, are good. Sports competitions are also conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive Faculty and Modern Facilities but Needs Better Placement Opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. But actually, there was no civil engineering in my college. The infrastructure has one block for CSE and IT, another block for ECE and EEE, and for mechanical, there is an admin block too. In that admin block, only first-year students will be there.

reviews.review_heading: Our college - An Open Book.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and hostel is pretty good. There are excellent labs for practical-based learning, and the library has a huge collection of books. Classrooms also have LAN connections and projectors, which enhance digital-based learning. The facilities are also good. The hostel is neat, and the mess food is not too good but edible. The canteen offers a variety of dishes that are super affordable. For medical emergencies, we have a dispensary, and for sports and games, we have 4 ...

reviews.review_heading: I am actually satisfied with the college even though there are no placements. Everything is okay.
reviews.review_text:
The college infrastructure is super. It has one of the best Wi-Fi options available for our department. Equipment is available for labs. Classrooms are very neat, and there is also a departmental library in the college. 
The quality of the food in the mess is just average. Canteen food is also average; medical facilities are just okay, and games are conducted annually.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JNTUH College of Engineering Jagtial.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities in my college. We have college Wi-Fi, professional labs, highly advanced classrooms, a department library, and advanced computer labs for simulation and coding, etc. Hostel facilities are not up to the mark. Mess food is not good in taste, but we can manage. Medical facilities are good. There is a separate first aid center in the college and an ambulance service. There is a basketball court, kabaddi court, kho-kho court, cricket ground, football ground, and indoor games...

reviews.review_heading: Inside JNTUHUCEJ - Strong academics and excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Buildings in this college are very spacious. The computer science and engineering department is in an academic block-I, along with this, information security is also available. It contains a departmental library, Wi-Fi connectivity, and computer labs. There is a canteen near to this, which contains good and many food items. The hostel contains many spacious rooms, and a big mess hall, where good food is provided. It also provides Wi-Fi connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the infrastructure and environment.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for our course are good. Classrooms are fine, but the projector is a bit slow. Labs are excellent in terms of infrastructure. Wi-Fi is a bit slow in the classrooms and labs. The library is perfect and many books are available. The hostel is not that excellent. The food is not good.

Roles like associate software engineer, software trainee, etc., are offered to the students.

It mainly focuses on the all around development of students along with technical and non technical fests, seminars, workshops etc.

likes.text: I chose this course as ECE provides jobs in both the software and hardware sectors.

The college hosts various cultural programmes including annual days, farewells, fresher parties, departmental fests, and more interestingly, the MEGA FEST every year along with games and sizzles every semester.

college_info.intro:
SCSVMV popular Programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech students are placed in top companies and top sectors such as Accenture, Cognizant, and others. SCSVMV University BTech students can join government organisations such as Indian Railways, ISRO, ONGC, and others. The salary offered to the BTech students is quite satisfactory and is as per the market standards.
SCSVMV's MBA students can find jobs in the Marketing, Finance, HR Management, and Supply Chain Management sectors. MBA students are taught managerial skills and skills such as logical thinking, problem-solving, and others required in future job roles. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by SCSVMV and their respective eligibility and SCSVMV fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    SCSVMV University accepts MAT, XAT, CAT, ATMA, and other scores for admission to MBA. The university also conducts its own entrance exam for MBA admission.The minimum marks required for MBA at Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya (SCSVMV) in 2024 is a recognised undergraduate degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does SCSVMV accept for admission to MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya (SCSVMV) accepts JEE Main scores for admission to its B.E./B.Tech programs. Candidates seeking admission can apply with their JEE Main scores or Uni-Gauge-E scores. SCSVMV also conducts its own entrance exam called AISEEE/ERA Uni-Gauge for admission to B.E./B.Tech programs.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College is good but they have to develop the infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 70-85% of students are getting placements who are studying in this college. The highest package of this college is nearly 10 LPA. Here you can study without paying a single rupee by playing the games if you are joining in the departments other than Engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: Some facilities are good while some are average. There is no Wi-Fi provided in classes or library or labs. In hostel, Wi-Fi is provided but it does not work properly. Food in the canteen is good but somewhat expensive as compared to outside.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college should improve placements.

review_content.Placements: 38% of students are placed in our course. It is not actively done by the placement offices. The highest package is INR 5 LPA, and the lowest package is INR 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Accenture, Wipro, Cognizant, and other small companies that also provide placement for students in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classroom, labs, library, workshop, seminar hall, projectors, practical sessions, etc. are there. Hostel facilities are not bad, and fees are acceptable. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are also encouraged at our college. Sports like volleyball, basketball, cricket, etc. have active participation in our college.

faqs.answer: It is possible to get admission in SCSVMV for B.Tech with 45-50 % in Class 12th, but it is not a guarantee. The admission process for SCSVMV University is based on the entrance exam or merit in the qualifying exams. Scores of CBSE 12th are accepted for B.Tech admission. Candidates must have passed 10+2 examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects, and obtained at least 50% Marks (40% marks for candidates belonging to reserved category)
faqs.question: Q: Can I get admission in SCSVMV for B.Tech with 60% in Class 12th?

faqs.answer: Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya (SCSVMV) accepts the following entrance exam scores for admission:For B.E./B.Tech: AISEEE/ERA Uni-Gauge exam conducted by the university or JEE Main score is acceptedFor other courses like MBA, M.Phil, Ph.D., and BAMS: CAT, MAT, XAT, ATMA, JMAT, and scores in the test conducted by SCSVMV University are acceptedThese are the main entrance exam scores accepted by SCSVMV for admission into various programs.
faqs.question: Q: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by SCSVMV for admission?
