review_summary.college_name: SCSVMV Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall the college is very good.

content.Placements: 90 percentage of students are placed in my course. 40 LPA is the highest, 7 LPA is the lowest, 9 to 10 LPA is average package for my course. Amazon, AutoDesk, Flipkart etc. are top recruiting companies. 90 percentage students got internship for my course in Amazon, Tech Mahindra are companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available in my course are very good like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms. The library in our college is very good and the books facilities are like research, articles, programming and coding books etc. The quality of food is good in our hostel. In the hostel there are medical facilities, gym, indoor games, and etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and I recommend others to join the college.

content.Placements: I am in ECE. About 40% of students got placed. Some local companies visit the college. More than 50% of students got internships from this college. When you compare it with other colleges, you can always see the numbers are low. But when the company comes and you get placed, you will get a job guarantee. Top companies visit the college.
content.Infrastructure: There is good infrastructure because of the library and other departments. I can't say it is awesome but I like it. The infrastructure of the library is always good. When you come to the ECE department, toilets are good. The gym and hostel are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is good but they have to develop the infrastructure.

content.Placements: 70-85% of students are getting placements who are studying in this college. The highest package of this college is nearly 10 LPA. Here you can study without paying a single rupee by playing the games if you are joining in the departments other than Engineering.
content.Infrastructure: Some facilities are good while some are average. There is no Wi-Fi provided in classes or library or labs. In hostel, Wi-Fi is provided but it does not work properly. Food in the canteen is good but somewhat expensive as compared to outside.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college should improve placements.

content.Placements: 38% of students are placed in our course. It is not actively done by the placement offices. The highest package is INR 5 LPA, and the lowest package is INR 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Accenture, Wipro, Cognizant, and other small companies that also provide placement for students in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classroom, labs, library, workshop, seminar hall, projectors, practical sessions, etc. are there. Hostel facilities are not bad, and fees are acceptable. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are also encouraged at our college. Sports like volleyball, basketball, cricket, etc. have active participation in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Disappointed with the placements.

content.Placements: 35% of students were placed in our batch. INR 5 LPA is the highest package, and INR 2 LPA is the lowest package in our course. Accenture, Cognizant, Wipro, TCS, etc. and other small companies offer placements. 40% of students got internships. Software developed, associate engineer, data analyst, etc. are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, seminar halls, workshops, libraries, projectors, and computers are available. Food quality is average. Medical facilities were good. And sports and games also provide good participation and encouragement for students. Cricket, basketball, volleyball, and other games are encouraged.

admission_overview.college_name: SCSVMV Admission 2025: Eligibility, Application Process, Fees

admission_process.title: SCSVMV Kanchi University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SCSVMV University admission is open for all the courses. The university offers UG and PG programmes specialised in Engineering, Commerce, Business administration and others.SCSVMV Universityconducted an online mode of application. Admission to all the courses is both merit entrance based. Applicants looking for admission to the university can apply online through the official website of SCSVMV University. To know more about the SCSVMV Kanchi University admission process along

SCSVMV Kanchi University offers entrance and merit-based admission to all its courses. Admission to all UG and PG courses is open. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course will have to appear for the entrance exam for admission to BTech, BSc, BAMS, MD, BBA and others. Further, the university also offers merit-based admission to some courses based on last qualifying exam scores. The table below lists courses offered at SCSVMV Kanchi University courses eligibility along with their accepted entrance exams, & selection process:

Check here for more details aboutSCSVMV Kanchi University courses

SCSVMV Kanchi University admission process 2025is open. The college accepts various entrance exam scores such as CUET/MAT/CAT/ATMA/NEET and others for admission toBTech, MBA, BCA and other courses. Further, for admission to other courses, the university offers merit-based ad admission.. Check below the step-by-stepSCSVMV Kanchi Universityadmission process:
Step 1: SCSVMV Kanchi University Application Process 2025

The eligible candidates need to apply online on the official website of Sanjivani University. It must be noted that the eligible candidates must have completed theentrance examformalities & must have qualified the eligibility criteria for their respective courses before applying to the University.
Step 2: SCSVMV Kanchi University Selection Process 2025

Admission to the courses is both merit andentrance-based. The institute has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech, BBA, MBA, BAMS and others. Further, for other courses university offers merit-based admission.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for the document verification. Selected candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Does SCSVMV accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya (SCSVMV) accepts JEE Main scores for admission to its B.E./B.Tech programs. Candidates seeking admission can apply with their JEE Main scores or Uni-Gauge-E scores. SCSVMV also conducts its own entrance exam called AISEEE/ERA Uni-Gauge for admission to B.E./B.Tech programs.

faqs.question: When are SCSVMV application forms out?
faqs.answer: The SCSVMV application forms for the academic session 2024-25 have been released for UG and PG courses. The application forms can be filled in online and offline mode.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Tech at SCSVMV?
faqs.answer: The seat intake for B.Tech at Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya (SCSVMV) University is 270. The SCSVMV application forms for the academic session 2024-25 for UG and PG courses. The application forms can be filled in online and offline mode. Students should visit the official website of the college for the latest information about the admsiion process.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by SCSVMV for admission?
faqs.answer: Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya (SCSVMV) accepts the following entrance exam scores for admission:For B.E./B.Tech: AISEEE/ERA Uni-Gauge exam conducted by the university or JEE Main score is acceptedFor other courses like MBA, M.Phil, Ph.D., and BAMS: CAT, MAT, XAT, ATMA, JMAT, and scores in the test conducted by SCSVMV University are acceptedThese are the main entrance exam scores accepted by SCSVMV for admission into various programs.

placement_report.college_name: SCSVMV Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: SCSVMV Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 2.5 LPA , INR 6 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, the highest package offered during SCSVMV Kanchi University BTech placements 2023 stood at INR 6.5 LPA . Further, leading companies such as Accenture, Cognizant and Hexaware Technologies visited the campus during SCSVMV Kanchi University placements 2023. Other than this, according to Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during SCSVMV Kanchi University UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 4.00 LPA and INR 2.50 LPA, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in my course are very good like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms. The library in our college is very good and the books facilities are like research, articles, programming and coding books etc. The quality of food is good in our hostel. In the hostel there are medical facilities, gym, indoor games, and etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and I recommend others to join the college.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure because of the library and other departments. I can't say it is awesome but I like it. The infrastructure of the library is always good. When you come to the ECE department, toilets are good. The gym and hostel are very good.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but they have to develop the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Some facilities are good while some are average. There is no Wi-Fi provided in classes or library or labs. In hostel, Wi-Fi is provided but it does not work properly. Food in the canteen is good but somewhat expensive as compared to outside.

reviews.review_heading: The college should improve placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, classroom, labs, library, workshop, seminar hall, projectors, practical sessions, etc. are there. Hostel facilities are not bad, and fees are acceptable. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are also encouraged at our college. Sports like volleyball, basketball, cricket, etc. have active participation in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, seminar halls, workshops, libraries, projectors, and computers are available. Food quality is average. Medical facilities were good. And sports and games also provide good participation and encouragement for students. Cricket, basketball, volleyball, and other games are encouraged.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students in this locality, but I would not recommend it for others.
reviews.review_text: The iconic part of the college was the central library. It was huge. You can also see some ancient books and antiques. The campus was good with average greenery. Recently, there was renovation work. Now, it's much better. Hostels were good, but fees were high after renovation. Wi-Fi was provided only for laptops. Labs were fine.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college as I got everything I expected, including good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was quite enough for students. Every classroom had a projector. Our college had a huge library with all kinds of books, from curriculum-related books to novels. It had a good hostel. The quality of the food was good. It had a huge ground to place every sport and game like cricket, football, basketball, and Kabaddi. We also played indoor games like table tennis and chess.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were good. The library was good. The mess was not that good. Wi-Fi was also not good. Labs were not that advanced. Lab assistants were fine.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. Our labs and classroom were good and well-furnished. The library had over 100,000 books. The hostel was good. The quality of food in the mess was good. The canteen was excellent. Medical facilities were available. Sports and games were very important in college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is average. Because this college is not familiar in kanchipuram also.
reviews.review_text: In my department, we have the best computer lab facility with high speed internet. We have average classrooms, seminar hall, mini department libraries and a big college Library. Hostel facility is good. The quality of food is good only and it is vegetarian. A medical center is available. Playground and gym are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an affordable college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good, but not worth it for the given fees. The infrastructure of SJSCAH is not good because it has only a single building named both the administrative block and the academic block, which also includes small rooms as departments.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Chandrasekharendra Saraswathi Viswa Mahavidyalaya University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are good and comfortable. The hostel is better than before. Ayurvedic medicines are provided as treatment. The canteen is good. Sports and games are encouraged. The ground is good for playing. The infrastructure is good and they are making it better. The library is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Very good placement in our university. Very good infrastructure. Faculty is good
reviews.review_text: Very good facilities and infrastructure in our university. The Wi-Fi facility is good. Library facility is good. Labs are very clean and rooms are air conditioned. Medical facilities are available inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Somewhat good about studies and placements in CSE but not good for some branches.
reviews.review_text: Our campus had no Wi-Fi. Classrooms were good and the library was wonderful. There were good labs but the presentation of the equipment was less. When strength is more, it is not enough. Students are divided into two batches. There were hostels at our university. The hostel was good and served better food.

reviews.review_heading: Years becomes days at SCSVMU.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a decent environment and good infrastructure. Course wise, we were upgraded a lot but still, need changes in the style of exams and others. All our classrooms were equipped with smart class systems. It was a very clean and eco-friendly environment. We had good sports facilities.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college which has all good quality which is required for any graduation course.

review_content.Placements: Minimum and average students are placed in my course. Students who pursue different subjects like bio, commerce, and arts are also placed in the same way. The highest package offered is 8.5 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruitment is there in Reliance, Nilon, and many others.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are computer labs, science labs, and a library for various experiments and educational purposes. Medical facilities are also provided at Shankaracharya Hospital. Sports and playgrounds are also good. A canteen is provided for lunch. Students who are interested in sports can play wherever they want.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Best private college in CG with great infrastructure, but placements are mostly IT-based.

review_content.Placements: Placements are decent but are heavily dominated by IT companies like TCS, Wipro, and Capgemini rather than core electrical firms. About 60–70 percent of the batch gets placed. The highest package is around 10 LPA, while the average package is 4 LPA. Internships are mostly done at BSP or CSPDCL. Top roles offered are graduate engineer trainee and software analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is lush green and unarguably the best in the state. The Central Library is excellent and well stocked. Electrical labs are functional, though some equipment is old. Wi-Fi connectivity is decent. Hostels are average; the rooms are okay, but the mess food is repetitive and average in taste. Sports facilities are good, with grounds for cricket and basketball courts.

review_summary.college_name: CSVTU Bhilai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college. The best for engineering that you could find in Raipur, at least.

content.Placements: The highest recorded placement is 42 LPA with the lowest varying from 5 LPA to 7 LPA. Various companies visit our campus with regular internship opportunities. Companies like SAP, Cognizant, TCS, etc., visit our campus. Opportunities are being provided to everybody who is worthy of them.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is decent with good facilities. The campus has a lush green garden. The only con is that the campus is a little far from the main city. Other than that the campus is quite nice with Wi-Fi and library operation till 7:00 PM. Day scholars are also provided with a bus facility.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Why you should prefer rungta college of engineering & technology, Bhilai?

content.Placements: Till now I think it was my best decision that I selected this college. Since I'm in 3rd year, recently I got selected for WIPRO paid Internship as a system engineer. In IT Course, 40% students got internship in TCS & WIPRO. In 25-26 placement session, 54 LPA was the highest offered package for Cloud Computing Expert role. I can say 90% student from IT branch get placement every year.
content.Infrastructure: Rungta college has a huge campus of 150 acres, with a circular building for academic purpose, all the SMART classroom, library, cafeteria, hostel, well-equipped labs are maintained with proper services and high-speed Wi-Fi is installed in every building. Food is not so tasty but it can be managed. E-library is also available With the LAN Serve. No much sports facility are there but a large cultural festival organise every year with great arrangement.

admission_overview.college_name: CSVTU Bhilai Course Admissions 2025: Fee, Application Process, Eligibility & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: CSVTU Bhilai Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: CSVTU Bhilai admission is offered to courses at UG, PG, diploma and doctoral levels. These courses are available in the streams of Engineering, Architecture, Management, Pharmacy, Computer Applications, and Vocational Studies. Chhattisgarh Swami Vivekanand Technical University offers courses via its six different teaching departments. Apart from this, 44 Engineering colleges, 1 Architecture institution, 40 Polytechnics, and 11 Pharmacy colleges are affiliated with CSVTU Bhilai, which offers courses such as MBA, MCA, BArch, etc. At the university campus, students can only study BTech and MTech courses. The mode of application at CSVTU Bhilai is online. Additionally, admission to CSVTU Bhilai courses is either entrance exam-based or merit-based. For admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, MTech, the university accepts various national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main/ XAT/ CAT/ CMAT/ GATE.

faqs.answer: CSVTU Bhilai MBA admission is provided in the following two ways:University/College-level counsellingDTE counsellingThe criteria for both the counselling processes is the applicant's ATMA/CMAT/MAT/CAT/XAT score. Aspirants with a valid exam score must register for counselling either on the institute's official website or the official DTE website. Shortlisted candidates must report to the university for document verification and fee payment.
faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA at Chattisgarh Swami Vivekanand Technical University, Bhilai?

faqs.answer: CSVTU offers MBA programme through various institutes affiliated with it. Some of these institutes provide MBA admission under Management Quota. Candidates applying for admission under the Management Quota are not required to participate in the DTE counselling. Such can directly register and apply on the official website of the institute. Management Quota seats are allocated through college/university-level counselling which is based on the applicant's CAT/CMAT/MAT/ATMA/XAT score.
faqs.question: Can I get admission to MBA at CSVTU Bhilai without appearing in DTE counselling?

admission_process.title: CSVTU Bhilai Admission process 2025

paragraphs: Candidates need to participate in the selection rounds of CSVTU for admission. The admission process at CSVTU begins with the opening of the application portal. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:

The mode of application is online. Candidates need to pay an application fee to register for a course. Aspirants need to fill out the form and upload the specified documents to complete the application process.

CSVTU Bhilai selects candidates for most of the courses based on the entrance exam. The university considers JEE Main, GATE, NIMCET, GPAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. Besides, CSVTU considers academic merit for admission to courses such as BPharm, diploma, BCA, BSc, etc.. The first level of selection after the application process will be either based on the entrance exam or academic merit.

Once the selection rounds are over, CSVTU Bhilai releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected aspirants. Such candidates are further called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to pay theCSVTU Bhilai feeto confirm their seat in the university.

description: CSVTU Bhilai Cutoff 2025 is available for admission BE/BTech and other courses for all categories and rounds via the JEE Main and CG PET examination. Students can review the exam-wise sections below to know the round, category, course, and quota-wise cutoffs for various accepted exams. A few more exam-related updates are given below:

CSVTU Bhilai JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the CSVTU Bhilai CSE cutoff 2025 was 230193 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the CSVTU Bhilai B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 230193 and 568882 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 230193 and 256363, B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) (Hons) and B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Data Science) (Hons) were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at CSVTU Bhilai. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at CSVTU Bhilai to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of CSVTU Bhilai. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

From this section, students can view the CSVTU CG PET Cutoff 2025 for all categories under the HS category, as well as the cutoff for 2023. According to the cutoff in 2025, BE CSE rank in the last round was 89 at Bhilai Institute of Technology for the General HS category. In the case for the OBC HS category, the same course in the same round and institute had a cutoff of 102. reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Shri Shankaracharya Institute of Professional Management and TechnologyReviewed on 14 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. The best for engineering that you could find in Raipur, at least.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is decent with good facilities. The campus has a lush green garden. The only con is that the campus is a little far from the main city. Other than that the campus is quite nice with Wi-Fi and library operation till 7:00 PM. Day scholars are also provided with a bus facility.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Rungta College of Engineering and Technology, BhilaiReviewed on 12 Feb 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Why you should prefer rungta college of engineering & technology, Bhilai?
reviews.review_text: Rungta college has a huge campus of 150 acres, with a circular building for academic purpose, all the SMART classroom, library, cafeteria, hostel, well-equipped labs are maintained with proper services and high-speed Wi-Fi is installed in every building. Food is not so tasty but it can be managed. E-library is also available With the LAN Serve. No much sports facility are there but a large cultural festival organise every year with great arrangement.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Shri Shankaracharya Technical CampusReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college which has all good quality which is required for any graduation course.
reviews.review_text: There are computer labs, science labs, and a library for various experiments and educational purposes. Medical facilities are also provided at Shankaracharya Hospital. Sports and playgrounds are also good. A canteen is provided for lunch. Students who are interested in sports can play wherever they want.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Bhilai Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 6 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best private college in CG with great infrastructure, but placements are mostly IT-based.
reviews.review_text: The campus is lush green and unarguably the best in the state. The Central Library is excellent and well stocked. Electrical labs are functional, though some equipment is old. Wi-Fi connectivity is decent. Hostels are average; the rooms are okay, but the mess food is repetitive and average in taste. Sports facilities are good, with grounds for cricket and basketball courts.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Shankaracharya Institute of Professional Management and TechnologyReviewed on 30 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with all the facilities and placement in my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. They provide good notes, lectures, and explain every topic in detail. They even clear doubts personally. Here, students get extra facilities or activities through joining clubs like acting, Toastmasters. In the hostel, the rooms are quite good, and the mess is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Shankaracharya Institute of Professional Management and TechnologyReviewed on 30 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Nice faculty, smart classrooms, events, and many more interesting experiences.
reviews.review_text: We have a vast library with a good amount of ventilation and a variety of good books available for every branch. A game room is available in the boys' hostel and in the management building. Wi-Fi is available in the IDEAL lab, computer labs, and in some smart classrooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Rungta College of Engineering and Technology, BhilaiReviewed on 28 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Top college of Chhattisgarh for Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are much better than those of many other private institutes infrastructure is well maintained. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a big central library are available. Hostel quality is also good and maintained by the staff. Food quality is nice, a college campus contains a canteen, message, medical facilities, sports and other games grounds.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Shankaracharya Institute of Professional Management and TechnologyReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is very good for students who want to become successful people in the future.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, providing free internet access for students and staff across academic and hostel areas. Labs are well managed and always available to use. Classrooms and libraries are very clean and well managed. Hostel food is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Shankaracharya Institute of Professional Management and TechnologyReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Honest review and knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members can be better in name sports, and the infrastructure is good enough, Wi-Fi is available, and you can open seats that are related to the subject. You cannot play games or watch yet the canteen food is nice and the price is also under budget, sports events are very few.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Shri Shankaracharya Institute of Professional Management and TechnologyReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but during any event, the space is not enough. We feel very congested. For example, the academic block ground. This place is not big enough for all the students to fit in. Labs are good, all the equipment is available, and they are well organized. Almost every class has Wi-Fi facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Rungta College of Engineering and Technology, BhilaiReviewed on 19 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Average college. Don’t expect too much from the college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good and gives you a proper gym, but equipment is not available in the gym. It also gives decent-speed Wi-Fi and average food for the students. The fee is a little bit higher for the in-campus hostel, and the out-campus hostel has lower fees than the in-campus hostel. Overall, the infrastructure of the college is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Rungta College of Engineering and Technology, BhilaiReviewed on 15 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good for academic facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our course infrastructure has separate classrooms, labs, and a technical room here.  Wi-Fi lab is always available, classrooms are separate, a central library is available here, hostel facility is not good here, some cheap food, one boys' hostel and one girls' hostel, no separate beds here, one room has 4 students. The food is not good in the mess, medical facilities are not available. The sports grounds have basketball, cricket, and volleyball available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Chouksey Group of CollegesReviewed on 12 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Our college placements and faculty members are not very good and are at an average level.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our course. Wi-Fi is not very good. Classrooms are good. The library is good but not very good. The hostel facility is not good, and it has very poor facilities. Sports and games are at an average level.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Rungta College of Engineering and Technology, BhilaiReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good education quality at best budget.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of this institute offered to students are good. All the labs are well maintained, and free Wi-Fi is available for students. Classrooms are clean, and projectors are used for good teaching quality. A big central library is available. Hostel facilities are also good, and the food quality is good for every type of student. The campus consists of good infrastructure like mess, canteen, shops, sports club, grounds, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Rungta College of Engineering and Technology, BhilaiReviewed on 6 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Experienced professors and teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college also provides good support for Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, etc., which are available on our campus. There is also a mess and canteen in our college which serves hygienic food, and medical facilities, and sports are also available on our campus.

review_summary.college_name: Chaibasa Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is the best college, and all basic facilities are provided, except for medical.

content.Placements: In our college, about 60-70% of students from each branch get placed. My branch is civil, and the highest package is about 10-15 LPA, the lowest package is between 3-5 LPA, and the average package is 7 LPA. TCA is the top recruiting company for all branches. 100% of civil engineering students get internships from steel and cement companies. In civil engineering, our opportunities depend on our skills, like Autocad.
content.Infrastructure: College's infrastructure is excellent. There are separate buildings for every branch, such as CSE, EE, ECE, ME, and BSH. There are also four workshops for civil and mechanical students. Computer labs and an English language lab are available in the BSH building, and every building has labs required for its branch; for example, the civil department has a geotechnical lab. A library is also present on campus, and Wi-Fi is provided. There are three hostels on campus, but no medical facility or canteen is available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I can say the college is average. You can go for it.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students are placed in this session, and the highest is 10 LPA. This is good. The teacher and HOD help a lot. The college is very nice, and all HODs are very nice, and their behavior is also good. Many events were conducted in the college that motivated the students to participate and develop their interests overall.
content.Infrastructure: Evening classes are available in the college. Facilities are present, and each branch has the proper HODs, and the teachers are very helpful. They always try to help the students at all times. The Wi-Fi network and connection are also available on the campus; the speed is average, but it's okay.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Chaibasa Engineering College.

content.Placements: Around 30-40% of students get placed in my course. Many students are not placed because they are preparing for higher education or government examinations. The highest package in my course at my college is around 8 LPA, the average package is 3 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Chaibasa Engineering College in Jharkhand has a few shortcomings in its infrastructure, including a shortage of classrooms, average labs, and slow Wi-Fi facility. The hostel rooms are also considered below average. Classrooms are limited, labs are average, and the Wi-Fi facility speed is slow.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good, but placement is a big concern there.

content.Placements: Placements are not guaranteed, but if you work hard, you have a chance to get placed. If you are expecting a good placement from this college, don’t get your hopes up, as it may not fulfill them. Just aim for the lowest and give your best. Something good could happen.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. They offer seven courses B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering, B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering, B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, B.Tech in Electrical Engineering, B.Tech in Civil Engineering, and, recently, they have added BBA and BCA as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College Review of Chaibasa Engineering College .

content.Placements: As a student of the ECE branch at Chaibasa Engineering College, session 2023-27, I want to clarify a few points regarding placement details. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, and Tata Motors, with an average CTC ranging from 3 LPA to 8 LPA. About 60 to 70 percent of students have been placed in previous batches. The job roles offered in my course include SDE and Data Entry positions.
content.Infrastructure: Talking about the infrastructure and facilities we are offered, they are quite moderate. Renovation work is being done on the departmental building this year. 24/7 water and Wi-Fi are available for both students and faculty members. The hostel provides rooms that accommodate 2-3 students in a single room, with mess facilities available.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very facilitated for study. There is a hostel where all the students live together for all years. There is also canteen and cafeteria facilities. There is a particular building for all departments. Lab facilities for all are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chaibasa Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: There is no playground but Wi-Fi is available in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chaibasa Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 24x7 CCTV surveillance. The institute deployed a security guard at the entry gate of the hostel for physical surveillance and safekeeping of the hostel environment and assets. There are common room with an indoor game facility. It also has high-speed Wi-Fi, power backup, room delivery facility by in-house paid canteen and outdoor sports facility.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good if you don't have another college option or don't have money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at my college is average. This college is located 10 kilometers away from the town. There are no basic facilities available. My college campus is fully Wi-Fi, but it does not work properly. Hostel facilities are average.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the mess food.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not very good. Around 5 students are staying in one hostel room. The hostel has Wi-Fi. It works only sometimes. The food served in the food is not hygienic. There are no medical facilities. The hostel does not have a playground for games.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of Chaibasa Engineering College: pros, cons and everything in between.
reviews.review_text: The hostel's facilities are improving day by day. There is a 24-hour wi-fi facility for college students. The library is very useful for course books. The labs are very good. The quality of the food needs to be improved; it is below average. There is no playground inside the college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the college's mess quality.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure availability in our college and departments are very average. There are specific labs and program halls that provide you with a notification about daily life experiences. And the quality of the mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is not well maintained. Wi-Fi is not working properly. Not much equipment is available in labs. Most of the equipment is broken. Not all books which are important to students are available in the library. Faculty members are good and supportive. There is no medical facility in our college.

admission_process.title: Mohamed Sathak A J College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mohamed Sathak A J College of Engineering admission 2025is open. Mohamed Sathak A J College of Engineering offers various courses at the UG and PG levels. Admission to the courses is based on entrance and last qualifying exam. Students who have completed class 12/Diploma may apply forTamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) 2025for BE / BTech programmes admission conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE), Chennai. The application process atMohamed Sathak A J College of Engineeringis conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutMohamed Sathak A J College of Engineeringcourse admission2025.

Mohamed Sathak A J College of Engineering course admissionis completely entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the college must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularMohamed Sathak A J College of Engineering courses:

Mohamed Sathak A J College of Engineering admissionsare primarily merit-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Mohamed Sathak A J College of Engineering is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Mohamed Sathak A J College of Engineering Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSEC. The application fee is INR 500. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
The institute selects candidates based on merit/TNEA counselling or TANCET scores. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theMohamed Sathak A J College of Engineering feeto confirm their seats at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty members. It provided good placements in 2022-23.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, department-wise labs, classrooms, and a library are available here. All facilities and infrastructure are available in MSAJCE. A hygienic canteen is available for dining within the premises. An entertainment hall with LCD, TV, indoor games, and reading rooms are available. The hostel has a landline telephone and Wi-Fi access.

reviews.review_heading: MSAJCE: heaven of happiness.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and a green environment make us feel like we are at home. Hostel food is very nice for 24/7, the transport facility is so good, the laboratories are well maintained and it is a place where the students are peaceful.

reviews.review_heading: A genuine review about msajce (2021).
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi which they have provided is highly in low of Mbps and utilizing 30 Mbps, there is a library and they assure that with old and local books/authors. They facilities of the college hostel is not worth for the money providing to the students, food is not hygiene and good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MSAJCE - Mohamed Sathak A J College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. The hostel is well maintained. The college has lush greenery. A playground is available.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms were spacious with well-ventilated systems. Digital projectors were also available for presentation. There was also a huge library for students. The canteen and mess facilities were good. They also provided various food items at affordable prices. Food delivery was also available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to become a successful person in the future, then join our college.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms were spacious. Our college has a huge library with free high-speed internet for students. Canteen and the mess facilities were good. They provided a variety of food items at affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the facilities, and campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like classrooms, labs, a library, and a playground are available for students to use. The facilities in the college are good like they have rooms with cupboards, fans, cots, etc. Wi-Fi is also available in the hostel for the students' usage. The quality of the food provided in the hostel mess is good and sometimes average. Students are allowed to play games after college time.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has really super infrastructure and nice faculty members with great helping staff.
reviews.review_text: Weekly 4 days non-vegetarian food is available in the college mess. The canteen is available and serves food 3 times per day with both vegetarian and non-vegetarian. The hostel has 2 and 5 sharing rooms and also has air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms. The hostel fee may differ as per the choice of air-conditioned rooms and non-air-conditioned rooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: There are many classrooms and a large area of ground. I am a day scholar. I asked my friends about the hostel, and they said it was good. There are more than 1 lac books in the library. Many sports events are conducted every Saturday, and VR games are also conducted here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MSAJCE - Mohamed Sathak A J College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text:
All the facilities are available in our college. We have labs,
a library, a canteen, a mosque, a new innovation center, and a huge play area for all sports. Our college is surrounded by IT sector companies like TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, etc. Wi-Fi is available only in the hospital 
Mack lab is provided. They will take only Industrial visits

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for education and passion but there are some disappointments.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are neat and have good infrastructure. But the quality of the food served is very bad. Wi-Fi and other amenities are provided in hostels. Every year, a hostel day is organised where you can celebrate. All the rules and regulations are well-maintained on campus by seniors.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MSAJCE - Mohamed Sathak A J College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good, like 24 hours of Wi-Fi, mac labs, good classrooms and a big library. The hostel is very good, like good and healthy food and snacks and 24 hours of medical facilities. Our college should give importance to academic and sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Enjoyed the each and every moment in College Life.
reviews.review_text: The college building consists of four floors. Separate Labs for all departments. The library is there for the students and staffs. The hostel is very nearby to the college building. Wi-Fi is there for the students in the Hostel. Students those who interested in sports can join the Particular one and can play for the college team in many tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Happy to be part of this Institution, I am Blessed to study in this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. The campus has buildings consists of well furnished classrooms, seminar halls, drawing hall, workshops, laboratories, computer centers, library, staff rooms and with an air conditioned auditorium. Playground for both indoor and outdoor games. Hostel with mess and a hygienic canteen is available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, and you can select this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. All the departments are present in a single building, which is the only negative point, and other than that, the infrastructure is very good. Canteen facilities available in the college are average, and there is enough space for the students to have food. Hostel facilities are good enough, and the quality of the food provided is also good.

reviews_list.review_title: My college review UBDT College Davanagere.

review_content.Placements: Placement opportunity is very minimal. I attended 3 companies on campus, out of which I qualified in two. The package they offer is around 3 Lacs per annum. Students should also go for off-campus interviews as on-campus placements are very few in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is not that great as it is a government college. I believe it needs renovation or some improvement. The buildings are old, but not too bad. Quite good education. Decent infrastructure for UBDT Government Engineering College, Davanagere.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely, our college is so good.

review_content.Placements: My course is Civil Engineering and 85 percent of students are placed in our courses. The highest package in our college is 17 lakhs per annum, and the lowest package in our college is 5 lakhs per annum. Top companies are coming to my college, such as Wipro, TCS, Infosys, IBM, etc., and a total of 85 percent of students get internships from Infosys.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good, and infrastructures are designed well. Wi-Fi facilities are also provided in classrooms, along with good smart boards. Hostels are also provided. Hostel food is good, and they provide good canteen food. They also provide medical facilities in case of emergency.

content.Placements: About 40% of students get placed in this college. The highest salary is 8 LPA, while the lowest is 1.2 LPA for our course. The top recruiting companies include Prestige, Arbee Structures, and Kalpatharu. Nearly 40% to 50% of students receive internships in various private and government sectors. The roles offered for our course include site engineer, structural design engineer, and project management.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in this college is very old, and the classrooms do not have any windows. There are no proper facilities or equipment in the laboratories, and there is no Wi-Fi available anywhere on the campus. The library is not well-maintained. As for the hostel, the building lacks painting and plastering, giving it a very old appearance with cracks all around the structure.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college and healthy environment.

content.Placements: That's much not good in placement. Our talent plays the main role. We should try by our talent. College will call companies, but not all companies, not much. But we can get companies through our talent; it is fixed one. The college helps us to get good companies and allows us to do many works.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and best hostel facility in minimum amount, and good for students who are studying over there. The environment is kept good in the campus, and the availability of the resources near the college is also more. We get everything we need to study; all are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: My college review UBDT College Davanagere.

content.Placements: Placement opportunity is very minimal. I attended 3 companies on campus, out of which I qualified in two. The package they offer is around 3 Lacs per annum. Students should also go for off-campus interviews as on-campus placements are very few in this college.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is not that great as it is a government college. I believe it needs renovation or some improvement. The buildings are old, but not too bad. Quite good education. Decent infrastructure for UBDT Government Engineering College, Davanagere.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely, our college is so good.

content.Placements: My course is Civil Engineering and 85 percent of students are placed in our courses. The highest package in our college is 17 lakhs per annum, and the lowest package in our college is 5 lakhs per annum. Top companies are coming to my college, such as Wipro, TCS, Infosys, IBM, etc., and a total of 85 percent of students get internships from Infosys.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good, and infrastructures are designed well. Wi-Fi facilities are also provided in classrooms, along with good smart boards. Hostels are also provided. Hostel food is good, and they provide good canteen food. They also provide medical facilities in case of emergency.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really good college for everyone.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course is 73%. More than 42 students are placed in top companies such as DFH, Dalmia, PVR and many more. These are the recruiting companies. Internships include planting, construction, and site visits. The highest package offered is 52 LPA, and the lowest package is 4.2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided to each student, such as materials and wi-fi connection in class, a lab with all the required materials and hardware, and infrastructure, are good compared to other colleges. The hostel also has food. The canteen and all the facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure and hostel is very old, but the teaching is excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in this college is very old, and the classrooms do not have any windows. There are no proper facilities or equipment in the laboratories, and there is no Wi-Fi available anywhere on the campus. The library is not well-maintained. As for the hostel, the building lacks painting and plastering, giving it a very old appearance with cracks all around the structure.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and healthy environment.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and best hostel facility in minimum amount, and good for students who are studying over there. The environment is kept good in the campus, and the availability of the resources near the college is also more. We get everything we need to study; all are available.

reviews.review_heading: My college review UBDT College Davanagere.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is not that great as it is a government college. I believe it needs renovation or some improvement. The buildings are old, but not too bad. Quite good education. Decent infrastructure for UBDT Government Engineering College, Davanagere.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, our college is so good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good, and infrastructures are designed well. Wi-Fi facilities are also provided in classrooms, along with good smart boards. Hostels are also provided. Hostel food is good, and they provide good canteen food. They also provide medical facilities in case of emergency.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college for everyone.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided to each student, such as materials and wi-fi connection in class, a lab with all the required materials and hardware, and infrastructure, are good compared to other colleges. The hostel also has food. The canteen and all the facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not good. Our college provides Wi-Fi. We have good labs. All classrooms are a bit old. A new building is under construction. It is good and spacious. The campus provides great infrastructure. The library is open 12X7. It is peaceful. The mess is not good. Our canteen is average. The old building is not good. A hospital is near our college. Our college provides good sports equipment. The hostel fee is Rs. 20,000 per annum.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides decent infrastructure, teachers, and placements.
reviews.review_text: It is one of the oldest government colleges in Karnataka, with decent infrastructure. All facilities are good. The food served in the hostel is decent. Mess is also available. There is a hospital on our campus. Sports are conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our teachers and the college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was good. It was an old college, but facilities were provided properly. We had labs, an auditorium, and a huge library where you could sit and read. The hostel was excellent. They provided food at the appropriate time.

reviews.review_heading: It is a government college with the best facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college building is good. They are constructing new buildings. Laboratories are average. Library consists of old books but there are no new editions. Canteen is very small but food served is good. Medical facilities are available in our college. Faculty members do not support students regarding sports and cultural activities.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with everything considering it as a government college.
reviews.review_text: UBDT College of Engineering has the best infrastructure when comes to students' facilities like labs, library, internet center, etc. The hostel infrastructure is average, and food quality is above average. The fee charges are very low.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best for great education at a low cost.
reviews.review_text: Classroom and libraries are good in infrastructure. The Wi-Fi facility and digital library are also available in the college. The library timings are in favor of students. The hostel is good in food and infrastructure. For final year students, they allot one room for each student. In the 3rd year, they allot 2 persons in a room. The hostel has high a secure with the CCTV facility.

reviews.review_heading: This is good government engineering college in Karnataka with knowledgeable teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the maintenance of a hostel is good. Our college old, and the food is better quality. Some other games and sports are concentrated better way, and canteen is maintained daily clean, and maintain the food quality to as per amount paid.

reviews.review_heading: This college is absolutely recommended.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, but it has to make some changes in the building. As the college is very old, the buildings are to be modified. Overall, the college has every facility which students need. The college has a basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is focusing on placements which could help every student with their job.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a vast library, which is providing all the necessary and best books, magazines and newspapers. Our department also has a separate library for our specific course. Classrooms are spacious, and labs are well-equipped. Wi-Fi facilities are available in labs.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University B.D.T College of Engineering, Visvesvaraya Technological University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not much good because it is a government college. The library is good which contains all types of books. The hostel is better, but the buildings are old. There is a new hostel for SC and ST students. Our college provides a canteen, medical facilities etc.

course_faqs.question: Does NITTE University offers scholarships to MBA students?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, NITTE University offers scholarhsips to MBA students. As per the scholarship, twenty percent (20%) of the seats are allocated for toppers. Selection of candidates will be based on the performance in NUCAT, Group Discussion, Written Ability Test and Personal Interview. These top students will be qualified for scholarship amounting to 40% of the prescribed fee. The MBA fee structure is mentioned in the table below:Scholarship CategoryGeneral CategoryINR 75,000 per semesterINR 1.25 Lacs per se

overview_faqs.question: What is the course fee at NITTE University?
overview_faqs.answer: The university offers multiple courses. However, some of the top courses offered at NITTE University is MBA, MBBS, MSc, BSc, BTech among others. To have a clear understanding, students can check the table below to know the course fee offered at the university:Courses*Total Tuition FeeMBAINR 5.30 lakhMBBSINR 79.1 lakhMScINR 2 Lacs to INR 3.2 lakhBScINR 2.8 Lacs to INR 6.9 lakhBTechINR 5 Lacs to INR 10 lakh* The total tuition fee is gathered from external sources. Hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: NITTE University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good research-oriented environment.

content.Placements: Nearly 30 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package of our course is 7 LPA. The average package is probably around 4.5 LPA. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for the course are Biocon and Merck. Almost 60 percent of the students got an internship at either industrial companies or at research centers in India.
content.Infrastructure: The Department of Biotechnology has around 5-6 labs for various subjects. Research is highly promoted to students at all academic years. Wi-Fi for both students and faculty is provided. The Department of Biotechnology also has a departmental library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good college.

content.Placements: 50 percent students are placed. 20 LPA is the highest, 2 LPA is the lowest, and 10 LPA is the average package offered for my course. Bicon, Fixar, Sipla, and some more really good companies come for placement in my course. All the students got internships because of their potential.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are really good, high standard, and well maintained. They clean it all, good and maintain it well. All these facilities are also really well maintained and very good for the students. It’s nice to enjoy all the things in and around the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Things you should know before joining NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE University .

content.Placements: Around 60 percent of the students are placed, and the average salary is around 3 to 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are IT companies, but recently companies from UAE and Dubai came to our college to recruit biotech students. It is a cold drink company, and they wanted people for it.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is great. Like the hostel rooms, washrooms, classrooms, everything is great. We have AC classrooms, and there is one big library, one library where they keep journals, one for computer, one discussion room, and we also have department library. The only bad thing is we don't get proper Wi-Fi in college or hostel. Even the food in mess is bad, but the games and sports facilities are great. There are gyms, basketball court, and football court.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Imaging Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good in academics and provides a high certificate value all over India.

content.Placements: Students with 75% or above in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology in higher secondary get placement. The course fee is about 4 LPA and may increase every year. Internship is provided for students for 6 months and can be extended to 1 year if interested.
content.Infrastructure: Every classroom is provided with projectors. Wi-Fi is available for all students and faculty. A high-quality library is provided and will be open even during holidays. For sports and other activities, a gym, a Zumba dance hall, a football ground, a basketball court and an indoor stadium are available. Food is good, and the mess is hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Structural Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good for the masters.

content.Placements: Students are eligible for placements from the 3rd semester. Companies such as Atkins, Brigade, and Shoba visited the college. The highest package offered is 7 LPA. About 70 percent of students got placed. I plan to do a Ph.D. after this. The college provides internship opportunities. Stipends vary, with some being unpaid. Projects include various attributes, helping students gain hands-on experience and industry exposure from time to time as well.
content.Infrastructure: NMIT provides on-campus hostels for both boys and girls with 1689 capacity. Twin-sharing rooms are available for 1st year students. Second year onwards, boys may opt for twin-sharing or four-sharing rooms. Wi-Fi all over the campus with CCTV security. Computer labs are spacious and have a good number of PCs. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated, and also air-conditioned. The library is good, and open till 12:00 AM.

admission_overview.college_name: NITTE University Course Admissions 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: NITTE University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: NITTE University admission 2026isentranceandmerit-based. The institute offersMBA, MBBS, MSc,and other courses at UG, PG, PG Diploma, doctoral, and fellowship level courses in the fields of Management, Engineering, Computer, and Information Technology among others. Admission to the MBA course is based on a valid score on thenational-based entrance examscore. Apart from this,NITTE Universitycourse admission forBTechisNUCAT.

NITTE University offers various undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, PhD and fellowship courses, such asMBBS, BPharm, BSc,BDS,MBBS, MDand others. Candidates seeking admission to NITTE University courses must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria set by the university for their desired course. Below are the eligibility and selection criteria details for some of the NITTE University courses:
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreNITTE University courses
Note 1: Admission to both General and NRI category seats in MBBS is based on inter-se merit in NEET-UG

*Note 2:Candidates who are Indian nationals and have completed class 12 in India, fall under the General category. Admission to the BSc (Hons) Biomedical Science programme under the General Category is based on merit in the All India Entrance Test - NUCAT (Nitte University Common Admission Test). Candidates for NUCAT will have to complete and submit the Online NUCAT registration form available on the official website.

NITTE University fees are a sum of various components such as tuition fees, caution deposits, exam fees, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually.

Coming to affordability is among the causes of many students quitting college or their degree. Although the availability of student loans and scholarships has made education more affordable, qualifying for one of these loans or scholarships frequently comes with a set of requirements that must be met. Find below theNITTE University tuition feealong with average package details for various courses:
Note:Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.

NITTE University accepts eligible candidates based on seats available for the different programmes. Interested candidates must check the number of seats allocated for their desired course before applying. Check out the course-wise seat intake at NITTE University:
Note:Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.
The university offers over 50 courses and admission to various courses is different. The below points mentioned NITTE University course admission 2026 for a few of the top courses:
Step 1: Application
Candidates can apply on the official website of NITTE. For entrance-based courses, applicants must visit the respective exam's official website to register for the desired course exam.
Step 2: Selection
Step 3: Counselling
Selected candidates must attend the counselling for the desired course (if applicable), and complete the choice-filling process.
Step 4: Seat Allotment & Admission Confirmation

Seats will offered to the students based on their merit in the entrance exam, and choice filled during counseling. to confirm the admission, candidates must report to the campus and complete the admission formalities.

However, admission to the BSc (Hons) Biomedical Science programme under the General Category is based on merit in the All India Entrance Test - NUCAT (Nitte University Common Admission Test).

courses_data.description: NITTE University offers a full-time BTech that lasts 4 years. To get into this programme, candidates must apply and appear in NUCAT exam conducted by the university. Further, candidates must pass Class 12 or equivalent examination with not less than 45% aggregate. The university admits candidates under two categories i.e., General category and NRI category. NITTE University offers BTech in various specialisations, such asBTech in AI and Data Science,BTech in Biotechnology,BTech in Civil Engineeringand others. Below is more information about the eligibility requirements, selection criteria, and fees for NITTE University BE/BTech admission in 2026:

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission to BTech at NITTE University?
faqs.answer: No, NITTE University offers entrance-based admission to BTech. Candidates are required to apply and appear for the NUCAT (Nitte University Common Admission Test) conducted by the university. After filling out the eligibility criteria candidates are required to apply on the official website of the university. After all the procedures the university releases its merit list. If the candidates are shortlisted on merit they are required to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.

faqs.question: What are the documents required for B.Tech admission at NITTE University?
faqs.answer: Documents required during NITTE University BTech application process are listed below:Class 10 and Class 12 pass certificate for proof of date of birth (Original + 3 attested copies)Transfer Certificate (Original + 3 attested copies)Migration Certificate from the Board of the institution last studied (Original + 3 attested copies)Eligibility Certificate issued by Nitte UniversityPhysical fitness certificate from a registered medical practitionerBlood group certificateAadhaar cardPhotographs

faqs.question: Can I download a copy of the KMAT admit card after the exam?
faqs.answer: No, students will not be allowed to download a copy of the KMAT admit card 2025 after the exam is over. KMAT admit can downloading link will only be live form the day of release till the exam day.The admit card may also not be accessible in the student dashboard after the exam or result announcement. Moreover, since the signed and stamped admit card will be considered valid for any activity post the exam, even if you can download a fresh copy after the exam day, it will be of no use. So, student

courses_data.name: NITTE University MBBS Admissions 2026
courses_data.description: The MBBS course duration is 5.5 years at NITTE University. It is a UG-level programme and the total seat intake is 250. Students looking for admission to MBBS will be required to qualify in the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test, NEET-UG which will be led by the National Testing Agency generally in May, each year.

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for MBBS programme at NITTE University?
faqs.answer: NITTE University offers admission to MBBS is based on NEET score.Candidates who wish to apply for MBBS programmes offered by the universitymust have passed Class 12, with 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology, and English as one of the languages of study. Candidate should have completed 17 years of age as of 31 December of the year of admission.

faqs.question: When does MBBS admission will take place at NIITE University?
faqs.answer: The MBBS course starts on the date prescribed by the Medical Council of India, usually during the first week of August. However, students need to complete Class 12, with 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Biology/Biotechnology and English as one of the languages of study. Candidate should beNEET-UGqualified. The candidate should have completed 17 years of age as of 31 December of the year of admission.

faqs.question: How can I get MBBS seat in NITTE University?
faqs.answer: To get a seat to MBBS at KIMS Karad, candidates must appear for NEET UG entrance exam. Candidates who secure a rank in NEET UG exam are required to fill an online application form with submitting their scores and other documents at the time of filling the application form. The candidates will be shortlisted based on their past academic records and scores obtained in the NEET UG.

faqs.question: What is NITTE University cutoff for MBBS?
faqs.answer: NITTE University cutoff 2023for MBBS is declared on the basis of NEET UG scores folowed by the NEET UG Counselling. Candidates seeking admission to NITTE University MBBS course must apply through the NEET scores. faqs.question: How can I get BPharma seat at NITTE University?
faqs.answer: Applicants are offered a seat in BPharma programme of NITTE University based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The college evaluates the application form of the applicants for their eligibility. Once selected, applicants must pay a fee to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BPharma at NITTE University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete Class 10 and Class 12 with not less than 45% marks in Physics, Chemistry and Biology/Mathematics with English as one of the languages of study to apply for NITTE University BPharma. After filling out the eligibility criteria candidates are required to fill out the application form by visiting the official website of NITTE University.

faqs.question: What is the age limit to appear for CAT?
faqs.answer: There is no age limit to appear for CAT. The CAT exam is open for fresh graduates as well as working professionals. Since CAT is accepted by over 1300 B-schools across India for their full-time as well as executive MBA or online professional courses, a lot of working professionals appear for the CAT to pursue such courses. CAT score is accepted by Iims for full time MBA, executive MBA and FPM programmes.Other top MBA colleges in India also shortlist candidates for executive MBA or part-time MBA

faqs.question: How do I get admission to NITTE?
faqs.answer: NITTE offers a wide range of courses at UG and PG level in various streams such as Engineering, Allied Health Sciences, Pharmacy, Dentistry, Biological Sciences, etc. The mode of application in NITTE University is online. Admission to various courses are offered on the basis of merit, however, few courses are there for which candidates need to appear for the entrance exams.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by NITTE?
faqs.answer: The university offers more than 50 courses in multiple fields. However, the eligibility criteria for MBA programme is a bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate. Interested candidates can check a few of the course-wise eligibility from the table presented below:CourseEligibilityMBABachelor's Degree in any stream under 10+2+3 or 10+2+4 scheme with a minimum of 50% aggregate (including languages) at degree level.MBBSClass 12, with 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Biology/Biotechnology and English as one of the languages of study. Candidate should beNEET-UGqualified. The candidate should have completed 17 years of age as of 31 December of the year of admissionMScGraduate with 50% to 55% aggregateBSc*Class 12 with 40% to 50% aggregateBTechGraduate with 45% aggregate*Candidates who are Indian nationals and have completed class 12 in India, fall under the General category. placement_data.title: NITTE University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the latest report, the highest package offered during NITTE placements in 2024 stood at INR 52.63 LPA. Further, the participating recruiters offered over 1,000 placements to various courses of the Class of 2024. The top recruiters of NITTE University in 2024 included Amazon, Cohesity, Commvault, Microsoft, Twilio, Nidec, AIBOD, Nidec Read, Corporation, Yokogawa Electric, etc.

faqs.question: How are the placements at NITTE University?
faqs.answer: NITTE University offers good placements annually for its various courses like MBA, MCA and BTech, etc. In 2024, over 400 recruiters participated and presented over 1,000 placements to the batch 2024. The key highlights of NITTE University placements for the Class of 2024 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) the highest package INR 52.63 LPA Total offers 1,000+ Total recruiters 400+ NOTE: The placement data year was not mentioned in the official placement report. qs_world.description:
NITTE  has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, NITTE  fell 5 ranks to #586 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, NITTE  climbed 10 ranks to #162 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
