hostel_campus.college_name: NITTE University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostellers are provided with a cot, cupboard, study table and chair. Every hostel has solar water heaters, WiFi facility, common telephone, TV room, reading room, visitors lounge, water coolers, generators, 24x7 security and surveillance cameras. AC rooms are available in some of the hostels. The hostels also have facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

library.description: The library has a collection of 82317 volumes of text (31 March, 2018) and reference books, 1300+ e-journals and 242 Technical Journals (in print) both national and international. The total area of the library is 31000sft and accommodates 750 students at a time. A well furnished Audio/Visual centre provides all sorts of self study digital sources. The digital library subscribes to numerous E-resources and provides access to VTU Consortia online journals. The e-resources can be accessed across the Wi-Fi campus. The digital library subscribes to scholar online journals from ASME, ASCE, IEEE, Elsevier Science Direct, Springer, Taylor and Francis, Proquest, and Knimbus organizations. There are 25 computer systems provided to the users on LAN. The institute library is an active member of DELNET, which is the largest network library in the Asian region.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Athletic Track, Volleyball Courts, Table Tennis, Indoor Basketball Court, Throw ball Courts

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE UniversityReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really good research-oriented environment.
reviews.review_text: The Department of Biotechnology has around 5-6 labs for various subjects. Research is highly promoted to students at all academic years. Wi-Fi for both students and faculty is provided. The Department of Biotechnology also has a departmental library.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE UniversityReviewed on 21 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Really good college.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are really good, high standard, and well maintained. They clean it all, good and maintain it well. All these facilities are also really well maintained and very good for the students. It’s nice to enjoy all the things in and around the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE UniversityReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Things you should know before joining NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE University .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. Like the hostel rooms, washrooms, classrooms, everything is great. We have AC classrooms, and there is one big library, one library where they keep journals, one for computer, one discussion room, and we also have department library. The only bad thing is we don't get proper Wi-Fi in college or hostel. Even the food in mess is bad, but the games and sports facilities are great. There are gyms, basketball court, and football court.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by K.S. Hegde Medical AcademyReviewed on 26 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is very good in academics and provides a high certificate value all over India.
reviews.review_text: Every classroom is provided with projectors. Wi-Fi is available for all students and faculty. A high-quality library is provided and will be open even during holidays. For sports and other activities, a gym, a Zumba dance hall, a football ground, a basketball court and an indoor stadium are available. Food is good, and the mess is hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 18 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good for the masters.
reviews.review_text: NMIT provides on-campus hostels for both boys and girls with 1689 capacity. Twin-sharing rooms are available for 1st year students. Second year onwards, boys may opt for twin-sharing or four-sharing rooms. Wi-Fi all over the campus with CCTV security. Computer labs are spacious and have a good number of PCs. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated, and also air-conditioned. The library is good, and open till 12:00 AM.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE UniversityReviewed on 18 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Bangalore days in NMMA College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very different, as it is built in forest areas near coastal areas, and it is full of greenery. Hostel facilities are very good compared to other hostels. We get delicious food and menu changes every month. We get to eat different dishes in a week, there are 3 days of non-vegetarian food like chicken, and another 3 days of fish.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE UniversityReviewed on 17 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: For Master's, this is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The labs and other sports facilities are up to the mark. A lot of extracurricular activities are focused on, apart from academics. There is quality and a sense of fraternity among students. Wi-Fi all over the campus with CCTV security. The hostel has the best infrastructure. Amazing facilities. Appreciable food. The cost of staying in a hostel is way less than actually renting or staying in a PG for the same facilities. The first years have restrictions on time. That is, they have to be inside b...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 12 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a very expensive college, but in Bangalore, it is common.
reviews.review_text: On campus, international students live in the hostel. All the students are helpful and belong to other parts of the world and the country. Mostly, 5:2 boys to girls live in the hostel campus, and there is equal respect for all. We celebrate all important functions on the hostel campus together. Classrooms are spacious and digitally updated. The hostel is good, and their mess is super. I'm sure you won't get better food at home than in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 10 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Please do some serious study and aim for IIT.
reviews.review_text: The library was vast with lots of books available. The classroom had projectors. We had a huge ground for sports. Clubs such as theatre club fashion club etc. Hostels were good they were mostly two seated. Mess food was average. Wi-Fi was all over the campus. There were cricket grounds volleyball court and many other grounds present.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 17 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I’m fortunate to be part of this institution.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms come with LED screens, a projector, and Wi-Fi. Hostels are provided with all the amenities, but students have to compromise with food. I’m a day scholar but have friends in the hostel who give mixed reviews about the hostel facilities. They have 24/7 medical support.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 12 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: We have good faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The department facilities are good, and the overall infrastructure is also good. We have Wi-Fi in every classroom within the department. The library facilities are also good. The hostel is good with decent food. Rooms and washrooms are also good. There is also a ground in front of the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 8 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good library. It has collection of online and offline books. We have good facilities. Good interaction is there with students. We have good football court for playing games. There is a basketball court as well for sports. It has good facilities in general. The clubs are good as well in all departments.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 8 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A wonderful experience in this green campus.
reviews.review_text: All the rooms are well-maintained and very hygienic. The food is good but it provides the same food every week. There is a medical center. There are various labs with high technology. There are places where students get a chance to focus on physical development. There is a gym and sports activities too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 7 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is quite good until it became a university and stopped taking admissions from COMEDK and KCET.
reviews.review_text: We have big rooms in the hostels and smart classrooms in the college, with good sanitation that gets cleaned daily. There is a big football ground, and Wi-Fi is available 24/7 in the hostels. The mess food is not quite to my liking, even though they have improved it.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by NITTE Meenakshi Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 7 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good learning environment with supportive faculty and strong placements.
reviews.review_text: Our department offers a supportive academic environment with well equipped classrooms. Along with projectors and campus-wide Wi-Fi. It makes learning more interactive. Labs, especially in electronics, VLSI, and computing, are regularly updated. This gives us practical exposure beyond theory. The central library is a major advantage. It has a wide collection of books, journals, and digital resources. Along with quiet study space for focused learning.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely excellent college due to the good placements provided by the faculty.

review_content.Placements: In HSC, students who get 75% or above get admission to this college. The lowest package for freshers is INR 20,000 per month. So many companies came to the college to give placements. The total marks of the exam for every subject are 75; at least we must obtain 50+ marks to get a job or an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are so many faculty members and infrastructure for courses, and separate departments are available. Computer labs and libraries are available for students. And the college provides free Wi-Fi for students to study. We have sports grounds available, and sports tournaments are also held.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college gives value for money.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% to 80% of students get placed in the CSE department. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA, the lowest salary package is 2.5 LPA to 3 LPA, and the average salary package is 5 LPA to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, TCS, Infosys, etc. All the students get internships from startups. Top roles offered are data engineer, software developer, and SDE intern.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel is average but all the facilities are provided like Wi-Fi, fully functional labs, and very good classrooms. The quality of the hostel and mess is average. Medical facilities, sports, and games are good. Labs have the latest computers with the latest processors. All the classrooms are air-conditioned and well-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best engineering colleges in Nanded.
reviews.review_text: This college has one of the best laboratories on campus. They are underground, and secondly, laboratory doors are made of glass which is beautiful. There are 10 laboratories for the CSE branch. Wi-Fi facility is enabled and there are 2 air-conditioners in each laboratory. Classrooms are also good. The canteen is in between trees so we get a natural environment. Our college is posh and clean. Our campus is surrounded by trees.

reviews.review_heading: The college is excellent only for computer science engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. They provide Wi-Fi but only for study purposes. The library available on campus is neat and clean. The quality of food served in the canteen is good. Sports and games are not available. The college doesn't arrange sports and games on campus.

reviews.review_heading: A below average college considering the present scenario.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not provided, instead LAN connection is there in classrooms and labs. The Classrooms are big enough and the furniture is good, having a capacity of around 80 students. The computer labs are good. All labs have air conditioning. There are a total of 10 computer labs. Quality of food in the mess is good, and has a LAN connection in every room. All rooms are of double occupancy.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of teachers, but provides good placements for 2015 and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: This college has all facilities and services. The quality was also good because the college has recently been renovated. Hostels were provided in good condition, and rooms were very clean, and cleaning was done every Sunday. In the canteen, food taste was average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Mission's College of Engineering, Nanded.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Each classroom has a projector, and some labs are also equipped with air-conditioners. The library is very big and extremely good. Wi-Fi is available here, but we get very slow speed. Food quality is excellent, and a variety of sports are available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in that locality.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility, labs and computers are available here, and everything is good. Computer systems are advanced, and technical staff members are available. Students are supported regarding their problems, and more than sufficient computers are available. The latest technology is available, and there are health and medical facilities. Bank and other daily services are available nearby the college. There is an airport near the college.

reviews.review_heading: Obviously, there is a really very good infrastructure and also Wi-Fi in our college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is really very good here, and you will get Wi-Fi everywhere on the campus except in the canteen. There are 10 computer labs only for the CSE department, and the IT department has its own labs. Labs are very posh. Every classroom has separate projectors, and the education system is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is average.
reviews.review_text: The hostel of the college is average. There are facilities like Wi-Fi, washing machines etc. The rooms are pretty good. But the food quality is not much good. The medical facilities in the college are average. Sports and games are conducted every year, during the cultural fest.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not that much good, but faculty members are friendly. The mess food is good, but don't have excellent taste. Wi-Fi facility is not provided, but the classrooms are good. Desks and blackboards are fine. Recreational facilities are average. Overall, our college provides good ambience along with studios environment.

review_summary.college_name: Pune Vidyarthi Griha's College Of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Recently Grade A by NAAC committee.

content.Placements: 40% students were placed from Information Technology. The highest package obtained is 12 LPA, and the lowest package obtained is 2 LPA. Companies like Amazon, Winjit, and Jio come for placement at our college. Internship was obtained at Infosys through Springboard. Top roles offered are Team Lead and Full Stack Developer.
content.Infrastructure: There are dedicated labs for programming and coding. My course offers access to 4 labs. Multiple Wi-Fi connections are available throughout the campus. Food facilities available in the college campus are the best, including breakfast, snacks, soft drinks, lunch, and dinner. Classrooms are modern, with smart boards and internet connections. The library has a digital lab along with a reading section.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Campus guide for college

content.Placements: As my college is under development college placements have been increased. Students of final year are getting internships and placements. Yesterday five students of computer department got placed in Cognizant company which is a great achievement for college.
content.Infrastructure: College have less infrastructure as of now but college building is new infrastructure. College does not have boys hostel but indeed have girls hostel and as of next year boys hostel will be ready. College has big building for lectures and a big parking area.

content.Infrastructure: As our college is developing, infrastructure is also developing. In our college, we have big classrooms with digital boards, a big library with all educational books, sports grounds where we can practice sports, and a big canteen for our meals.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Pune Vidyarthi Griha's College Of Engineering.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students are placed. The highest package in college is 20 lacs. The lowest is 3 lacs. And the average package is 5 lacs per annum. Electronics and telecommunications has the highest package of 20 lacs per annum. Internships are provided in the third year of college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are provided by the college. The infrastructure is good enough. The library is provided to students. Software and hardware are there. Computer engineering, IT, AIDS, ENTC, mechanical, etc. branches are present. The faculty members are well experienced in their professions .

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Memories are better than marks.

content.Placements: Decent placements were achieved for our batch, with 11 students securing positions in TCS via Superset at 3.6 LPA. Other students secured placements in Hexaware and Jio Digital, with the maximum package being 7 LPA. TNS India hired 20 students as interns for full-stack development at a salary of 9,000/month for 6 months. However, the number of students who secured jobs is less than the previous year.
content.Infrastructure: The campus of our college is smaller compared to others. We have jammers in college, so there is no internet access. The college labs are the best and large enough, and our library has 1 lakh books. Hostel facilities are very good, and we have the best mess food. The canteen food is decent. Sports matches are held once a year, with cricket, volleyball, and basketball being played.

reviews.review_text: The campus of our college is smaller compared to others. We have jammers in college, so there is no internet access. The college labs are the best and large enough, and our library has 1 lakh books. Hostel facilities are very good, and we have the best mess food. The canteen food is decent. Sports matches are held once a year, with cricket, volleyball, and basketball being played.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with excellent faculty members .
reviews.review_text: The Overall infrastructure in this college is great, the Labs and classrooms are well-equipped and have good Wi-Fi, the sports facilities here are also good, as compared to private colleges the Sports facilities are not that good but they are okay to do with.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with college faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college good, Wi-Fi is available in the computer lab and library. For college students virtual library is provided on its official website. Hostel facility is good with gym and morning meals. Hostel mess and canteen food quality is good. I like hostel gym the most.

reviews.review_heading: The campus could be better, and the infrastructure can be made beautiful.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available, and network coverage isn't available in a few sections of the college. The library is designed excellently to give students the best experience. It has all the books related to the syllabus and a proper seating area. Classrooms and labs are well-equipped with the required materials.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good faculty-to-student ratio.
reviews.review_text: The food quality was very good. The campus was Wi-Fi enabled. The computer lab and the cable connections were good. All computers were good. There were 30 to 35 computers for students. There was a digital panel.

reviews.review_heading: It got an excellent experience in our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is updated, very good, and very clean. All classrooms, computer labs, and the library are new and updated. All safety fine alarms and accessories are also provided. Wi-Fi facility is also provided in labs. A lot of books are available in the library. Classrooms, labs, and the library are clean and have a healthy atmosphere. There is no hostel facility on our campus. A lot of students stay in private hostels or private plots near our college. We are staying in a ...

reviews.review_heading: The campus isn't huge but beautiful, and the faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The library is aesthetic and beautiful. You enjoy your time there and also could concentrate on your studies. There are different floors for different departments and various labs. Sports are conducted, and there are often inter-college tournaments. Mess food is moderate. It depends on your choice of food, but it's definitely not bad.

reviews.review_heading: Our college was the best because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department was also good. Classrooms were clean. The library was full of books always. Labs were always clean and up to date. The quality of food served in the canteen was also good. Sports and games were very well managed in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Compared to the year 2015, our college infrastructure was well developed.
reviews.review_text: Good quality library, lab, and classroom are available in our college for us and also for the faculty. The library should contain an e-library. The classroom contains projectors, a computer set up, and a comfortable seating arrangement. Our college doesn't have a hostel. The canteen is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good, and staff is very supportive.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is developed. The laboratories are also developed, and new versions of the software are installed. Our library is also available for students. The food is available in the canteen at a reasonable price. The food quality is the best. A common room is also available for girl students.

reviews.review_heading: Reviews of Pune Vidyarthi Griha's College Of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good facilities. This college has a well designed administrative block and various other rooms and facilities for the students, such as a girls' common room and a boys' common room, a waiting room, a co-operative store etc. It has provided well-equipped furnished labs for basic sciences separately.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering (Electronics and Power) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for engineering.

content.Placements: Around 50-60% of students got placed in various companies like TCS, and many more. All students got an internship which can provided by our college in the scheme named AICTE.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. We have the best labs, classrooms, and a library. The girls' hostel facility is good. The food served in the canteen is good. The medical facilities are good. Our college promotes sports like cricket.
content.Faculty: The teaching staff of Mauli College of Engineering and Technology Shegaon is best and the quality of teaching is also good. The course curriculum makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are conducted by our college because our college is affiliated with SGBAU.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Ambitious college and life.

content.Placements: As I am studying for the CSE branch, there are very minimal placements. The highest package per annum given is 8 lakhs. Mechanical, electrical, and civil engineering students get the best placements and have an 80% placement track record. On average, the package is 5 lakhs per annum, and the minimum is 3 lakhs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: We have libraries, classrooms (kind of early 2000's college types), and a sports ground is available, but no one's there as nobody knows how to play. The main part, the canteen, is the worst. The college has a hostel but just for girls. Overall, you won't get a positive environment here, and you won't get college life vibes.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: St. Joseph College of Engineering and Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and BCA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. St. Joseph College of Engineering and Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for St. Joseph College of Engineering and Technology courses stands around INR 94,250 to 4,02,000.

faqs.answer: A:    St. Joseph College of Engineering and Technology provides programmes including M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Power Engineering, Civil Engineering, Instrumentation Technology, Computer Science Engineering, Structural Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Electrical Engineering, Electronics Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses does St. Joseph College of Engineering and Technology offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: St. Joseph College review

review_content.Placements: The placement of my batch and my senior batch was just average. All the students didn't get placed in the drive i.e. the placement was not 100%. Almost 45% of the students were placed in my batch. The highest salary package was monthly Rs. 25000 and the lowest was Rs. 20000, thus the average salary was around Rs.23000. The companies that visited the campus include Infosys, UST global, Federal Bank, etc. The students were placed initially as engineering trainees and then was promoted to different posts in long run. All students in the college were supposed to do an internship program (project) which was compulsory.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: A good college. I am satisfied and will recommend it to others

review_content.Placements: The placements are something that is not given much importance by the college. Mostly, the students search for jobs outside the college with the help of others as a maximum of 30% students get placed in one batch including all the branches of engineering. Hence, the placements have not improved over the years.
review_content.Infrastructure: SJCET has a decent infrastructure when compared to the other colleges in the area. The classrooms are neat and tidy, there are huge grounds for sports available, and hostels are also provided for the students. But, there is no option for ATM and banking facilities inside the campus. A library and laboratories are available here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Our college has cool infrastructure and decent placements.

content.Placements: Placements are above average for our seniors and juniors. Many prominent companies like Infosys and IBS were the top recruiters for the two years. Placements for the mechanical and civil departments were average. However, the placement training given to students from college was excellent.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has got an exceptionally well-maintained infrastructure, and the campus is eco-friendly. The lush green campus has got various trees all around it. Along with spacious classrooms, our college encompasses labs of various departments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Wonderful college in my own experience with good infrastructure and over all performance.

content.Placements: Very good placement history. Every year they bring more opportunities to students for getting campus selection. And a very active placement cell is setup for helping students to get campus placement they give better training in communication skills languages etc.
content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure. Is the one of the best college in the state. Very eco-friendly constructed building. And provides with high quality atmosphere which encourage students to perform and develop their real talent. The overall infrastructure is very good like world class library, labs, well designed classrooms with all facilities. Hostel and canteen are also maintained in wonderful way. There is no complaint in food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has cool infrastructure and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has got an exceptionally well-maintained infrastructure, and the campus is eco-friendly. The lush green campus has got various trees all around it. Along with spacious classrooms, our college encompasses labs of various departments.

reviews.review_heading: Wonderful college in my own experience with good infrastructure and over all performance.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure. Is the one of the best college in the state. Very eco-friendly constructed building. And provides with high quality atmosphere which encourage students to perform and develop their real talent. The overall infrastructure is very good like world class library, labs, well designed classrooms with all facilities. Hostel and canteen are also maintained in wonderful way. There is no complaint in food.

reviews.review_heading: St. Joseph College review
reviews.review_text:
The Wi-Fi system in the college is pretty good with the very good signal strength and it is provided 24*7.
The lab in the college is also excellent with all facilities and lab attendants.
The library is not 24*7 and it operates between 9 AM-5 PM. The library facility is very good with all range of books from all subjects. The books get frequently updated and the college does not hesitate in spending funds for the library. The library uses smart cards for different operations.
The college has a s...

reviews.review_heading: A good college. I am satisfied and will recommend it to others
reviews.review_text: SJCET has a decent infrastructure when compared to the other colleges in the area. The classrooms are neat and tidy, there are huge grounds for sports available, and hostels are also provided for the students. But, there is no option for ATM and banking facilities inside the campus.  A library and laboratories are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college contains plenty of labs, libraries for each course, and different labs. The quality of food available in our mess is good compared to other college hostels and canteens. Our college provides medical facilities to students on working days, and everyone can participate in sports and games, with training provided for better performance. Our college conducts several events that encourage students and help improve innovative ideas.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement in 2023, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: infrastructure is super. Green campus, good internet connections and lab facilities. Hostels also good, cleaned by the staff everyday, food is adjustable. Canteen also provide tasty food but cost is little high. Doesn't conduct much programs. If conducted quality of the programme is very bad.

reviews.review_heading: SJCET boasts of outstanding placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructural might of SJCET, with its well-equipped and regularly updated libraries and an adjoining college study center,. The state-of-the-art laboratories and building blocks with cut edges are absolutely great. The augmentation of the infrastructural facility took on a different dimension.

reviews.review_heading: St joseph  engineering and technology is an above average college in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are smart classrooms, internet is provided, and a highly stocked library is available. The arts and sports here are very pathetic compared to other engineering colleges; they don't promote any kind of sports and arts activities here.

reviews.review_heading: I had an amazing and unforgettable college life experience.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are top-notch here. There is a good food court with extraordinary food and free Wi-Fi for students. Lab workshops and practicals are effective. There are also a sports ground and gymnasium. There is good hostel accommodation with proper restrooms. You can engage in sports in your free time.

reviews.review_heading: St. Joseph's college is a well known college. Best experience with teachers and the campus.
reviews.review_text: The college's infrastructure makes a good feeling to the students. From the college gate, there are flowers present in the walkway. This is a great experience for every student on the campus. And mainly there are two blocks with 2 flours. And it should be appreciated that the college has a wonderful toilet with mirrors.

reviews.review_heading: Hope college will guide you rightly.
reviews.review_text: In the free hours, interested students can play sports, but there is no specific schedule for sports hours in the timetable. To compromise, students are asked to show their interest in extracurricular activities to build their skills. Basic medical kits are available for treatment. In case of an emergency, the students are brought to our hospital outside the college.

review_summary.college_name: Sree Narayana Gurukulam College Of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sree Narayana Gurukulam College Of Engineering - SNGCE.

content.Placements: In my point of view, the placement in my college is okay. Not the best, but almost all my seniors got the placement. There is a special placement cell present in our college that provides interview cracking techniques, aptitude training daily, and aptitude mock tests are positive sides.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is okay. Recently they introduced various changes on our campus. Also got NAAC accreditation with B+ grade. It also has NBA accreditation. Wi-Fi facilities are available. We have a well-maintained lab. We also have a better library with a lot of books by various authors. We also have two canteens both are providing the best quality food at affordable prices. The same quality of food is provided in our mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: An affordable college with the best faculty members and specialists — SNGCE.

content.Placements: I am from the mechanical branch, and there are 45 students in my class. Mechanical is a course that is recommended for students who are interested in 11th standard Physics. I gave 11th-standard Physics as an example only because the mechanical core consists of fluid mechanics, thermodynamics, etc. Everyone can take mechanical as their major if they are interested to learn more about mechanical instruments and others. Learning this course will give us placement in top organizations like ISRO, Tata, BHEL, and more. Almost 65% of students got placed in different companies from the last batch.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: First priority in engineering colleges.

content.Placements: Almost 60-70 percentage of students in our department got placement with an average salary package of 4-5 LPA. Recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra, TCS, Amazon, Vguard, etc. And also, many students got internship offers from top companies like HCL, ACER, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure and facilities are really good. Practical labs, libraries, and classrooms are pretty good. I'm a day scholar student, but my friends told me that the food and other facilities are really good in our hostel. Also, the rooms and kitchen facilities are really good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Outstanding College: Excellent Facility and Campus.

content.Placements: About 84% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary offered is 26 LPA and the lowest salary offered is 7.5 LPA. The average salary offered is 18 LPA. Top recruitment companies include McKinsey & Company, Infosys, Cognizant, Google, Deloitte, and others. About 65% of students have landed internships with businesses like McKinsey & Deloitte. The top roles available are Finance Manager, Development Manager, Business/Product Manager, HR, and more.
content.Infrastructure: The college has many facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The laboratories are clean and hygienic. The classrooms are large enough to comfortably accommodate each student. The library is also very large with a wide variety of books. The food quality is very good and healthy with clean, prepared food. Also, our college offers various games and sports including indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college life but poor facilities and college system.

content.Placements: Students are placed, but big company packages are not offered; it is a basic salary package that is provided. The highest-level package is 3.5 LPA. Top recruitment goes to Infopark companies at Kochi itself. Most of the students get internships, or the college provides internship support for students.
content.Infrastructure: The college has very basic facilities in the lab and classroom. Wi-Fi is not provided throughout the college but is provided inside labs. Hostel facilities are really good, and the food is very good. The college provides support for sports and games activities; also, programs are conducted.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for MBA at Sree Narayana Gurukulam College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: SNGCE offers a MBA programme, and the total tuition fee for this programme is INR 3.2 lakh. The fee might covers various academic expenses like tuition fees, registration examination fees, library fees, and other relevant charges. It is important to note that the fee structure is subject to change, and candidates are advised to refer to the official website of the university for the latest and most accurate fee structure.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Sree Narayana Gurukulam College Of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes, MBA course is available at Sree Narayana Gurukulam College Of Engineering. SNGCE offers a two-year MBA course divided into four semesters. To be eligible for the award of the degree, candidates shall complete the course in a maximum period of two years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass graduation to apply for the MBA course.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to M.Tech at Sree Narayana Gurukulam College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: For admission to M.Tech course at Sree Narayana Gurukulam College of Engineering, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. reviews.review_heading: Review of Sree Narayana Gurukulam College Of Engineering - SNGCE.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay. Recently they introduced various changes on our campus. Also got NAAC accreditation with B+ grade. It also has NBA accreditation. Wi-Fi facilities are available. We have a well-maintained lab. We also have a better library with a lot of books by various authors. We also have two canteens both are providing the best quality food at affordable prices. The same quality of food is provided in our mess.

reviews.review_heading: An affordable college with the best faculty members and specialists — SNGCE.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are excellent, with every type of equipment and tool available, and our college is proud to be one of the few with such facilities. Hostel and mess facilities provide maximum quality and quantity, with rooms including 2 B.Ed beds and 2 study tables with book racks, located in a well-maintained place where students can study and sleep peacefully without interference, and the mess food is good, safe to eat or drink, with a well-hygienic kitchen.

reviews.review_heading: First priority in engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure and facilities are really good. Practical labs, libraries, and classrooms are pretty good. I'm a day scholar student, but my friends told me that the food and other facilities are really good in our hostel. Also, the rooms and kitchen facilities are really good.

reviews.review_heading: Outstanding College: Excellent Facility and Campus.
reviews.review_text: The college has many facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, and a library. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The laboratories are clean and hygienic. The classrooms are large enough to comfortably accommodate each student. The library is also very large with a wide variety of books. The food quality is very good and healthy with clean, prepared food. Also, our college offers various games and sports including indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Good college life but poor facilities and college system.
reviews.review_text: The college has very basic facilities in the lab and classroom. Wi-Fi is not provided throughout the college but is provided inside labs. Hostel facilities are really good, and the food is very good. The college provides support for sports and games activities; also, programs are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and I am satisfied with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities are good. The infrastructure of our college is the best. The classrooms and laboratories are neatly maintained. The Wi-Fi facility is available with high-speed internet. The library is an independent building with a huge number of books. The hostel facilities are good. The canteen provides many popular dishes.

reviews.review_heading: The college and the faculty members are good but there's not much programs like Onam, Christmas etc.
reviews.review_text: The course is good enough, and the faculty members are much better than we expected. Our college provides all lab facilities for courses and subjects like Physics, Chemistry, C Programming, Maths, etc. The hostel's neatness and food are really good.

reviews.review_heading: Not a good college for people seeking placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel on campus does provide internet, but it is not as fast as we require. The food available in the hostel follows a weekly routine cycle which may contain non-veg, but it's mostly veg. Every afternoon we get veg except on Sunday. The college campus, however, is not that big, but the PG block, which was built recently, is tall, and almost 60% of the rooms are centralized AC. Although the B.Tech campus has a very nice center area full of grass and trees, the classrooms are mostly boring. M...

reviews.review_heading: My review about my college .
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not great the classrooms need to get better and toilets are damaged. The college needs more repairs and needs to get a better canteen and also painting and air conditioning. The hostel needs more repairing and the food needs better hygiene. The girl's hostel food is bad and some of them got food poison.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus experience.
reviews.review_text: All the basic facilities are available and maintained. Lab facilities are provided. The food available in the mess and canteen is hygienic and disciplined. Labs are good enough. Workshops are usually conducted based on various departments.

reviews.review_heading: The review of my college, SNGCE.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like Wi-Fi are available in the college. The college has labs, including CAD Lab, CAM Lab, FAB Lab, Mechanical Lab, Electrical and Electronics Lab, Chemistry Lab, and Physics Lab. The college has different libraries, including the Central Library and Department Libraries as well.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are actually very good, with many labs, books, and facilities for each department. The hostel has free Wi-Fi for studying. The mess and medical facilities are very good. However, the sports club is very inactive; the college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sree narayana college of engineering .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are actually very good, and there are many labs, books, and various facilities for each department. The college has free Wi-Fi for studying. The mess and medical facilities are very good. The sports club is actually very inactive. Okay.

reviews.review_heading: The review of my college, SNGCE  .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are actually very good, and there are many labs, books, and facilities for each department. The hostel has free Wi-Fi for studying, and the mess and medical facilities were very good. The sports club is actually very inactive.

reviews.review_heading: Heavenly campus. No worries.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, we have the best in Kerala. The quality of the teaching facilities is comparable to that of IITs, and our college has a number of labs. Classrooms are neat and eco-friendly. A hostel facility is also available here. There are two members in a room and it is also neat and tidy.

review_summary.college_name: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty but dissatisfied with placement.

content.Placements: The placement in our college is average because they only provide third-tier companies and BPO companies. They don't organize any on-campus drives; instead, they send students to off-campus drives. I totally dislike the placement, and now I am jobless and intend to study MBA in a different college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is beautiful with five blocks: one APJ Abdul Kalam Block, two Ramanujam Blocks, one Library Block, one Admission Block, and one Canteen Block. They recently painted and cleaned the buildings, making it even more beautiful now.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good coaching experience, but the worst hostel experience.

content.Placements: There are nearly 100% of the students placed yet, but most of the students are placed for the sake of showing the placed student percentage. The highest package is INR 6 lacs per annum, and the lowest package is INR 1.8 lacs per annum. TCS, CTS, HCL, Byjus, and Econ Systems are the top recruiting companies. Data analysts and circuit designers are the top job roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: The college facilities and infrastructure are quite good. We have labs with good equipment, classrooms with good ambience, and a library with a wide range of books. Hostel food is average, but the infrastructure and the stay in the hostel are the worst. If you want to put your son or daughter in this college hostel, please change your decision.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college because of the lack of programs.

content.Placements: There are around 40% of students in computer science and engineering. CSE course helps to find work in IT-related companies around the world. The college tuition fee is around Rs.80,000 per annum. Top recruiting companies include IBM, Byju's, and other top companies .
content.Infrastructure: Our college doesn't have Wi-Fi and classrooms. The canteen is shutdown for some reason. There are labs for our department of which the computer lab is good with Wi-Fi and air conditioning facilities. The other labs aren't much good. There is no importance for sports in this college which is disappointing.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: More than 88% of students were placed in our course in biomedical engineering. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1.25 LPA and the average salary package offered was 3.25 LPA. Top companies such as TCS, HCL, Wipro, Capgemini, etc., visited our campus.
content.Infrastructure: The college facilities and infrastructure were good for our course. Wi-Fi had excellent browsing speed. Wi-Fi was provided in R&D. All computer labs were clean and provided with qualified technicians. The library contained a large number of books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students had placements in the computer science department. Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTS), Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) off-campus, Dev Care solutions, and some of the banks were the top recruiting companies. The top recruitment company is CTS only. The internship was based on our interests. No arrears is a must.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel foods were average in our college and they encouraged the people who are interested to get involved in sports. The cultural events conducted were superb. For the library, all books were available but students mostly preferred teachers' notes.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college provides all facilities. Our college provides all kinds of sports and games. Food served is available at any time. It provides a high-quality mess and canteen. The college provides medical facilities too for our emergency use.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are good and very useful for students. We have a separate library for separate departments, and each staff member allows us to refer the books which are allotted. Quality of all the facilities is very good and helpful for the students studying here. Mess and canteen facilities are good and properly maintained. Medical facilities are also available, and sports and games are in good standards.

reviews.review_heading: Extremely satisfied with the college infrastructure, faculty gestures and the friendly environment.
reviews.review_text:
1. The infrastructure of the department was good with the needs like separate department library and well-equipped lab facilities and a decent classrooms. 
2. The quality of hostel facilities and food available in the mess is good and the college canteen has the enough items to choose the maximum stuffs. The sports and games are encouraged in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied due to the faculty and good placement opportunities provided for MBA students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our college are satisfied, and our college provides a peaceful environment to study and also a great platform. It also provides library facilities for students for placement opportunities and also research purpose online. High facility labs are available to perform well in our academics. The food provided in the mess is fresh as they prepare good and healthy food daily to the students. The college provides sports facilities for students to explore their career opportunitie...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average, but lab sessions are good. Sports activity is not available in the college. Canteen facilities are provided. So, the college infrastructure is adorable for the students. They provide parking facilities, and security services are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements, highly qualified and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. BME and CSE departments have separate RND labs which are used only for projects. There are other labs as well. ECE department has a separate block with labs. The machines in labs are too old including mechanical labs.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the department rules. They treated us like school children.
reviews.review_text: About the facilities, there is no Wi-Fi facility on the campus, and you are not allowed to bring your cellphones. There are many labs, but some of the computers in the computer lab were not working. There were only limited components in the ECE lab. Our college provides good medical facilities and does not promote sports and games. In fact, sports day was conducted only once during our four years. About the infrastructure, some of the buildings were good. The library has centralized AC, and it h...

reviews.review_heading: A review about Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: All departments labs are available with well-equipped machines, equipment and with well-trained lab assistants. Labs are equipped with proper safety measurements. Machines are arranged with proper spacing and ventilation. Water facilities are available on every floor. 2nd and 3rd year have sports hours weekly.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, worthy with the colleges among other colleges in Puducherry.
reviews.review_text: Labs are highly technologies with high-speed internet, sports activities were not much comprising, classrooms were moderate, food quality is not that much good in canteen, other snacks and juices will be good, but there is no place to play any games because no grounds are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college used to be great but the quality of the education has dropped.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was OK at best. It doesn't have any Wi-Fi facility. The college didn't have any playground facility. The quality of food in the canteen was optimal. There aren't any infrastructure related issues, but the labs could have been better.

reviews_list.review_title: Need to know about KKCEM College.

review_content.Placements: 98% of students are placed from our college. The highest package is 5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package is 3 LPA. Top companies are Tata Motors and Dakin. Tata required a 60% score, and the top role offered in our course is manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good, natural, and cooperative. The class has a smart board. Wi-Fi is available in the whole campus, like in the classroom, lab, library, and any other places. Hostel facilities are very good. Mess food is very good and healthy, and all national sports are done in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of KK College of Engineering and Management (KKCEM).

review_content.Placements: Overall, about 80% of students got placed last year. The highest salary package offered has gone up to crores. The average salary package offered ranges between 20-25 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Maruti Suzuki, Tata, etc., visit the college for placements. The top role offered is a software engineer. The placement cell is handled by students. Around 60% of students got internships from our batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms are okay and equipped with a fan, light, bed, and cupboard. Rooms are quite small and double-sharing for the initial 2 years of college. The meal is also good. The affordability of the hostel is not so expensive when compared to outside. 1st and 2nd year students have a double sharing room, which is very small for 2 people, as others are originally designed for one person. Each person gets a bed, a table, and a chair. The double-sharing room is very congested. From the 3rd year onwards, boys get a single room hostel. Mess food is eatable.

As per Shiksha verified reviews, KK College of Engineering and Management (KKCEM) has a rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Need About KKCEM College of Engineering and Management Dhanbad.

content.Placements: ( KKCEM )K. Polytechnic College of Engineering and Management, Dhanbad, is a good college. Placements in our college are good, and many companies visit our college to select students. It depends on the students, how much talent a student has or how capable he or she is of getting a job in a top company. If you want to join this college, go for it.
content.Infrastructure: ( KKCEM )K. Polytechnic College of Engineering and Management, Dhanbad, has a huge infrastructure. The campus has many outdoor grounds for games like football, basketball, volleyball, cricket, etc. Hostel facility is provided in two types, one is executive, and the other is a normal one. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. We also have a library and labs on campus. They provide excellent facilities to their students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Need about KK College of Engineering and Management.

content.Placements: The most attractive thing about the university is its high-paying packages in companies like Infosys, Wipro, and other highly reputable companies. Placements in our college are not like a cake piece belonging to some particular students. It is something that is reachable to all students equally.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and the environment on the campus are highly satisfying and are good for students to concentrate well. Rooms are very well ventilated. They have an accurate temperature in summer as well as winter. Students at the university take pride in telling others about their campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Need to know about KKCEM College.

content.Placements: 98% of students are placed from our college. The highest package is 5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. The average package is 3 LPA. Top companies are Tata Motors and Dakin. Tata required a 60% score, and the top role offered in our course is manager.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good, natural, and cooperative. The class has a smart board. Wi-Fi is available in the whole campus, like in the classroom, lab, library, and any other places. Hostel facilities are very good. Mess food is very good and healthy, and all national sports are done in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of KK College of Engineering and Management (KKCEM).

content.Placements: Overall, about 80% of students got placed last year. The highest salary package offered has gone up to crores. The average salary package offered ranges between 20-25 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Maruti Suzuki, Tata, etc., visit the college for placements. The top role offered is a software engineer. The placement cell is handled by students. Around 60% of students got internships from our batch.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel rooms are okay and equipped with a fan, light, bed, and cupboard. Rooms are quite small and double-sharing for the initial 2 years of college. The meal is also good. The affordability of the hostel is not so expensive when compared to outside. 1st and 2nd year students have a double sharing room, which is very small for 2 people, as others are originally designed for one person. Each person gets a bed, a table, and a chair. The double-sharing room is very congested. From the 3rd year onwards, boys get a single room hostel. Mess food is eatable.

courses_data.description: KK Engineering College B.E. / B.Techis offered to candidates at the UG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the B.E. / B.Tech programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 3 - 4 years programme.

courses_data.name: KK Engineering College After 10th Diploma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: KK Engineering College After 10th Diplomais offered to candidates at the After 10th level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the After 10th Diploma programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 3 years programme.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in KK College of Engineering and Management (KKCEM) for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
KK College of Engineering and Management (KKCEM) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in relevant stream from a recognised Institute.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th standard or equivalent examination.
Candidate awaiting result of 10th standard or equivalent examinaton can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidate must be permanent resident or comes under permanent resident of Jharkhand.
There is no minimum age requirement.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Rajiv Gandhi Government Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: The college provides many placement options for students in the private sector. Many companies come for campus placement and provide packages ranging from 3-10 LPA based on our skills. They also hire for paid internships based on the entrance exam and interview. Roles offered are electronic engineering, embedded engineering, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Each department has its own block consisting of Wi-Fi and labs. The college has common areas like a library, gym, and a sports ground. The canteen provides 3 time meals for students at fair price. The college has one block named lecture hall where all the classes are taken by all departments.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It has absolutely good faculty members, a low placement rate, and good infrastructure, and facilitie

review_content.Placements: Mechanical students get the maximum placements as the placement officer is from this branch. The average package is 5 LPA. Students with above 7 CGPA are offered placements in top recruiting companies like Sonalika, HCL, etc. Other branches also got placements but few companies visit the college for them. Most students get internships at DRDO and similar organisations.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are very good. It has a beautiful campus. The whole campus is cameraless and Wi-Fi is also available. There are different blocks and buildings for each trade. The hostel is only available for 1st year and the mess food is good. There is a basketball, badminton court, and cricket net on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for someone who has thought of destroying his life.

content.Placements: Only 5-6% of students got placements. The highest package is not above 4 LPA to 5 LPA. It is very rare to find a good package. If students have talent, then only they can get a good package on their own. College doesn't help in any placement or any job. Everything here should be done by students.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good and has very big campus with hostel. Food quality is average. It is far from the main market but everything is easily accessible. There are different blocks for every branch. You can go to the market in rickshaw anytime and can use bus timely.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The campus is bigger and more beautiful compared to other colleges.

content.Placements: Very few students get placed. Companies visit for placements, but only a few students get selected. The average package is around 5 LPA. HPPWD and some other companies are the top recruiters. Junior Engineer is the most common role. Suppose there are 70 students in a class; only 5 to 10 students get internships because of their low grades.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good; Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all nice and well-maintained. The hostel quality is average, and the food is also average. However, repairs take a lot of time. To pursue sports, one can use the cricket nets or the basketball court on campus.

The canteen provides 3 time meals for students at fair price. The college has one block named lecture hall where all the classes are taken by all departments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has absolutely good faculty members, a low placement rate, and good infrastructure, and facilitie

content.Placements: Mechanical students get the maximum placements as the placement officer is from this branch. The average package is 5 LPA. Students with above 7 CGPA are offered placements in top recruiting companies like Sonalika, HCL, etc. Other branches also got placements but few companies visit the college for them. Most students get internships at DRDO and similar organisations.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are very good. It has a beautiful campus. The whole campus is cameraless and Wi-Fi is also available. There are different blocks and buildings for each trade. The hostel is only available for 1st year and the mess food is good. There is a basketball, badminton court, and cricket net on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not much satisfied because of placement opportunities.

content.Placements: The college intake is 40 students for our course. Out of these, only the Covid-19 batch 2021 has fewer students, while the rest have approximately the full intake. All seats are filled, and only 6-7% of students get internships. Internships are mainly offered to B.Tech students. SDO and JE are the highest roles.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is provided with approximately every basic facility, such as drinking water coolers, Wi-Fi, labs, workshops, etc. The quality of food in the hostel is very poor. But the infrastructure is good and includes water coolers. The hostel has one large playground, a common area, and a mess area.

RGGEC Application Process

RGGEC Selection Process

The college selects students mainly on an entrance basis. ForBTech admissions, JEE/ HPCETscores followed by counselling are needed. ForRGGEC BArch admissions, students need to submit validNATA scores.

hostel_campus.college_name: Rajiv Gandhi Government Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for someone who has thought of destroying his life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good and has very big campus with hostel. Food quality is average. It is far from the main market but everything is easily accessible. There are different blocks for every branch. You can go to the market in rickshaw anytime and can use bus timely.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is bigger and more beautiful compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good; Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all nice and well-maintained. The hostel quality is average, and the food is also average. However, repairs take a lot of time. To pursue sports, one can use the cricket nets or the basketball court on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rajiv Gandhi Government Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Each department has its own block consisting of Wi-Fi and labs. The college has common areas like a library, gym, and a sports ground. The canteen provides 3 time meals for students at fair price. The college has one block named lecture hall where all the classes are taken by all departments.

reviews.review_heading: It has absolutely good faculty members, a low placement rate, and good infrastructure, and facilitie
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are very good. It has a beautiful campus. The whole campus is cameraless and Wi-Fi is also available. There are different blocks and buildings for each trade. The hostel is only available for 1st year and the mess food is good. There is a basketball, badminton court, and cricket net on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Not much satisfied because of placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The campus is provided with approximately every basic facility, such as drinking water coolers, Wi-Fi, labs, workshops, etc. The quality of food in the hostel is very poor. But the infrastructure is good and includes water coolers. The hostel has one large playground, a common area, and a mess area.

reviews.review_heading: Spent meaningful days in RGGEC (2020-2024).
reviews.review_text: When it comes to infrastructure, it is very good as the whole building is newly built. All facilities like the library, canteen, playground, and labs are well-furnished with all equipment. There are also hostel facilities for both boys and girls, but with less capacity for only 1st and 2nd-year students. The canteen facility is inside the campus, and the food stuff there tastes good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty of the college and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: This college provides you with smart classes. The infrastructure of the college is also good. The food at the hostel is also good with full hygiene. They provide full security in the hostel. The environment and surroundings near the college are also safe.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for learners who really want to learn things .
reviews.review_text:
All classrooms and labs have digital boards and AC. The college infrastructure is really too good as compared with other colleges in Himachal Pradesh. 
Boys hostel is for only 1 year, and girls hostel is for 2 years, but food in boys hostel is much better than girls hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Rajiv Gandhi government engineering college, Nagrota Bagwan review
reviews.review_text: In our college hostel is only available for first year students for next 3 years either you need to take hostel or PG. Labs in our college are well maintained and they have almost all the instruments required according to our university syllabus and wi-fi facility is also available. Also a Library block is under construction for our college students.

reviews.review_heading: Technical but not actually Technical.
reviews.review_text: Our college had good facility of Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library but the faculty provided is so discussing. So unsatisfied from college side as it is a government college and they only see their future not students. I do not have any hate feelings towards my college, but truth is truth. Not all the faculty is bad as some of teachers are good, but negative things hide all good things.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities like workshops, a library, 5G Wi-Fi, modern classrooms with modern equipment like projectors, a material lab, an AutoCAD lab, bus for industrial tourism. The hostel provides all facilities like 5G Wi-Fi, fans, drawers, and study tables. The food served in the hostel is average. Sports tournaments are organised by different branches. Our college has many modern labs.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good college with placements opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good and infrastructure is also not bad. The hostels are spacious and hygienic and location is also good. The hostel has security cameras. And Security is also strict. No student can go outside in night. Hostel has a warden too which checks students room time to time.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has one of the best infrastructures and hostel facilities. Our classrooms are very good. Labs, bathrooms, other facilities, etc., are all very good. Hostels are very good and affordable so everyone can enjoy these facilities. We appreciate it.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but lacking good staff.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are provided for junior girls and boys. Provides good Wi-Fi internet connections, and smarts classroom are there. Lots of high knowledge gaining books are there in the library. A canteen is also provided in the college for students and staff members of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities, and equipment.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the necessary infrastructure and labs and facilities, the ones that are required in any technical and management institute must possess. The living spaces are clean. Also, the food available outside the college is hygienic and healthy.

review_summary.college_name: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS ) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: I have a good experience, so students can join it.

content.Placements: As of now, I cannot talk about placements as the senior-most batch is in the 3rd year of MBBS, although they have many clinical postings. They're even posted to CHC Kheri Kalan and all in nearby villages like Badshahpur, and OPDs are not crowded as of now.
content.Infrastructure: It has a very nice and well-maintained infrastructure. Hostels have attached washrooms, and 2 students stay in a room. 1st year students' hostels are different from seniors'. The mess food is pathetic, bad, and overpriced. They even wrap up the food before the time. All facilities are good. Labs are well-equipped.
