college_info.college_name: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad Campus Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad under Amrita University offers scholarships to students as financial assistance. The eligible students are awarded Amrita Chancellor’s Scholarships which are offered to students according to their marks and admission interview performance. The below-mentioned is the criterion for Amrita scholarships:
Note: The above-mentioned scholarships are applicable for UG, PG, PhD programmes. These scholarships are not applicable to programmes in the fields of Pharmacy, Nursing, and Allied Health Sciences.
The following clauses are communicated to students during the scholarship admission:

Amrita scholarships are awarded on a one-time renewable basis, for any single programme in an academic year. The scholarship is valid for a period of one year and is renewable each and every year based on the student’s academic performance and also conduct

Scholarships commonly are tuition fee waivers only, and the amount of this waiver is based on the type of scholarship that is awarded to students. This is strictly non-negotiable and cannot be extended to any other fees categories or substituted in cash
No student is eligible to have more than one scholarship at a time, irrespective of the amount or type of scholarship and/or study support donations

The Scholarship Committee must set the evaluation criterion for cessation or renewal of the scholarship with applicable renewal conditions. The validity of the scholarship duration is based on the students' satisfactory academic performance in each and every semester / trimester, regular class attendance as well as good standards of behavior throughout the duration of programme

The scholarships are awarded with the support of the academic transcripts that have been submitted by various students as part of the eligibility fulfillment. Discrepancy in any of the supporting or submitted documents will result in immediate withdrawal of the scholarship and/or the admission

The students must submit the AIU (Association of Indian Universities) equivalence certificate for the last foreign academic qualification and/or various academic transcripts to complete the eligibility criterion. Non-compliance in the submission of the AIU certificate can also lead to withdrawal of the scholarship
Download the Amrita Scholarships Brochure

There are various other Student Financial Aid and Scholarships awarded to students. These scholarships are based on merit, economic need, equal opportunity, and also affirmative actions for socially backward groups. The scholarship policy does not discriminate against students or even scholars based on gender preference, gender, caste, age, faith, or even disability. Below is the summary of the criteria that play a crucial role in making the scholarship decisions:

Top students in any of the schools are eligible for this scholarship consideration. To avail of and become eligible for the merit scholarship benefit, students must provide proof of academic and scholarly accomplishments.  The percentile of students receiving this scholarship depends upon the school and area of specialisation.

The university is greatly committed to affirmative actions for such backward groups such as SC/ST, OBC, and other such groups that are approved by the Government of India. A certain percentage of such groups will always be receiving the scholarships each year.
The Special Disadvantaged groups include women, those with disabilities, and others. These groups are not treated with any discrimination and are afforded an equal opportunity for scholarship.
Scholarship Application Process

The students must contact the departmental office and submit the complete application form. The department will provide various students with a list of several scholarship schemes available for them. The students are responsible for submitting all the necessary documentation based on these schemes. Such documentation includes proof of merit, government-approved proofs for members of Backward communities, recommendation letters for merit scholarships, and any other necessary documentation for special disadvantaged groups.
Download the Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Faridabad Scholarships Brochure

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Baba Ghulam Shah Badshah University offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Baba Ghulam Shah Badshah University offers MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. The fees for Baba Ghulam Shah Badshah University courses range between INR 10,800 to 2,36,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college has an excellent atmosphere to study.

review_content.Placements: Placements on this campus are very poor, and 0.1% of the students got placed. Companies which are visiting the campus are very low graded, but the college grooms students for the future and helps students in real life sceneries. The department helps in internships for students and has given students the real corporate structure for an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and there are separate labs for each department. Wi-Fi is widely available, and classrooms are excellent and well-equipped. The hostel serves traditional food of the state, and it is maintaining its hygiene and cleanness. There is a well-established hospital on the campus and a good library. The campus is perfectly placed in between the hills, and it is very beautiful to watch.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Best university in Jammu with good facilities.

review_content.Placements: The students in my batch that were placed was around 40 % and every year around 40 to 50 percent get placed. The highest salary was 6 LPA and the lowest was 3 5 LPA and average was 3 LPA. The recruiting companies visit every year in the University like wipro, tata, Infosys etc. The roles that were offered were as firewall assistant, software analyst and providing technical support. The highest salary package was 7 LPA and the lowest was 3.4 kpa and average was 3lpa in my course. The 30 % of students got internship from my course and in wipro, suntech, Infosys.

review_summary.college_name: Baba Ghulam Shah Badshah University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Very Best University BGSBU.

content.Placements: Baba Ghulam Shah Badshah University has a separate training and placement cell which chooses the bright students and helps in placements. The university also provides free coaching for SSB and other exams. The companies visit our campus and recruit the students. There must be a minimum of 60% of students to be selected. The major companies are Mahindra, Amazon, etc. The average salary for selected students is Rs.20000 to Rs.30000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Baba Ghulam Shah Badshah University has the best infrastructure. Newly built buildings, classes, laboratories, a sports complex, synthetic athletic grounds, and a tennis court are available on campus. The university has excellent hostel facility, rooms, Wi-Fi facility in the hostel and campus. It is far better than other private institutes. Baba Ghulam Shah Badshah University will be like heaven for the students.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the experience, and I got to learn a lot.

content.Placements: High-value companies come for placements every year, and many students get placed. The university has a placement cell, which actively helps students to get in contact with the reputed companies, and they visit for the interview and recruit the best candidates suited.
content.Infrastructure: The college is perfect, and the timing is also perfect. University provides high-speed Wi-Fi for 24x7 on the premises to help students study through the internet. The university provides a suited environment for students to grow.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Partially satisfied. Though it is beautiful due to the greenery everywhere.

content.Placements: There are placements in our college, but very little. After the new VC have joined, there is a change in the placements. Our college management are planning to get more MNC companies for the placements. The current VC is trying his best to improvise the placement percentage. Which is a good initiative leaving behind the rumours about the placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The classrooms have chairs with pads. And the climate of the campus is fine to study. The infra in the labs are expensive, and they don't have enough experienced technician's in the labs. Few labs are quite spacious, whereas some are small. The roads are uphill and the hostels are near.

cafeteria.description: University has four well man-powered cafeteria/Canteens that function well to serve the students and staff members. The cafeteria is open on all the working days. And well Equipped with modernized cooking appliances

reviews.review_heading: Very Best University BGSBU.
reviews.review_text: Baba Ghulam Shah Badshah University has the best infrastructure. Newly built buildings, classes, laboratories, a sports complex, synthetic athletic grounds, and a tennis court are available on campus. The university has excellent hostel facility, rooms, Wi-Fi facility in the hostel and campus. It is far better than other private institutes. Baba Ghulam Shah Badshah University will be like heaven for the students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the experience, and I got to learn a lot.
reviews.review_text: The college is perfect, and the timing is also perfect. University provides high-speed Wi-Fi for 24x7 on the premises to help students study through the internet. The university provides a suited environment for students to grow.

reviews.review_heading: The college has an excellent atmosphere to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and there are separate labs for each department. Wi-Fi is widely available, and classrooms are excellent and well-equipped. The hostel serves traditional food of the state, and it is maintaining its hygiene and cleanness. There is a well-established hospital on the campus and a good library. The campus is perfectly placed in between the hills, and it is very beautiful to watch.

reviews.review_heading: Best university in Jammu with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good for all the departments experience computer department is well-equipped with projectors in every class. Wi-Fi is available almost in every department with good speed but sometimes poor too. There are different libraries too with thousands of books available. Every material is found there. Books are given for whole semester but afterwards fine is applicable. The university have boys and girls hostel too but they remain dirty as it is upto students to keep it clean. The ...

reviews.review_heading: Partially satisfied. Though it is beautiful due to the greenery everywhere.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The classrooms have chairs with pads. And the climate of the campus is fine to study. The infra in the labs are expensive, and they don't have enough experienced technician's in the labs. Few labs are quite spacious, whereas some are small. The roads are uphill and the hostels are near.

reviews.review_heading: Join BGSB University and study on the path of development with inculcating nature in the heart.
reviews.review_text: It has all the labs which are required for an effective course curriculum and also it has two specular lecture halls equipped with the latest technology and a vast library, periodical section, web section. The temperature there is also ideal for studying over the year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by College of Nursing, Baba Ghulam Shah Badshah UniversityReviewed on 18 Feb 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Amazing experience in the university campus, its so safe.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided over here are quite good and very satisfying though. Hostel rooms are in good condition and washrooms are common and well cleaned on daily basis. But they can improve the food quality of the mess. For a medical facility, there's a health care unit with all the basic medical aids. And there's a gym and sports club too.

reviews.review_heading: Bana Ghulam shah Badshah university is the best for any student.
reviews.review_text: The entire university is Wi-Fi enabled with the best internet speed. All the sports facilities are available like cricket, football, volleyball and best playgrounds. All the night lights are installed in our university, and I like to walk in the university's streets at night. The infrastructure is best, and every person wants to visit, and the university is beautiful. The best thing is all the facilities are available in BGSBU.

reviews.review_heading: Baba ghulam shah badshah university rajouri.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of BGSBU is awesome, very beautiful climate, it is a complete hill area. The university area is 1700 acres. Many types of departments and courses in differential streams available in baba Ghulam shah Badshah university, Rajouri, Jammu and Kashmir.

reviews.review_heading: BGSBU top universities, if funding is raised.
reviews.review_text: It's not that good because the University established recently and the funding from the centre is zero and the state is negligible. So mostly here infrastructure is fabricated type instead of concrete.wifi facility is given in hostels and classes as well but firewalls are not there. Labs are very good and well equipped but medical facilities are worst. Even the doctor is not always present here. Games and other co-curricular activities are given in good preference but the library doesn't have al...

highlights.summary: The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for B. P. Mandal College of Engineering admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: B. P. Mandal College of Engineering offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG level. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. BP MCE Madhepura courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for BP MCE Madhepura courses stands around INR 80,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    B. P. Mandal College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate passed 12th/equivalent with Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics as compulsory subjects from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.
Provisional entry is allowed, provided candidate must have been passed 12th/equivalent at the time of counselling.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of B. P. Mandal College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: Very few students are placed here. The highest package offered in VSE is 7 LPA and the lowest is 1 LPA. Around 3 to 4 students in CSE are placed of 7 LPA. In other branches are very low. In my branch, Civil there is very low placement. My college has collaborated with Salesforce, so you can get into the sales team by placements from here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms here are average, with a few having Smartboards. But the college also has seminar halls and a nice auditorium. The lab facility here are good compared to other Bihar engineering colleges. Labs have proper equipment with good lab assistants. The college has Wi-Fi, but 5GB per day is limited. The library is small and has only course books. The hostel is good, with good furniture, but the mess food is not good. The campus also has a volleyball court and a badminton court.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Tier-3: College diaries.

review_content.Placements: Students become eligible for campus placements from the 7th semester. The training and placement cell assists in skill development and resume preparations, but on-campus opportunities are very bad and need a huge development. There are very few companies visiting the campus for direct recruitment. Some students secure jobs through off-campus placements. The highest package ranges between 5-7 LPA. The average package ranges between 3-4 LPA. The official placements are between 25-30%. As many students prefer to prepare for Gate, UPSC, and other plans after graduation, many students opt for higher studies like M.Tech, MBA etc. Overall, the placement rating is 4/10.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Do not take admission to my college.

content.Placements: Placements at my college are below average. In my college, TPR is not good so placement is not good. You can try off-campus because you have skills and then try off-campus so my college is not for placements. My college gives only B.Tech degrees, not skills and knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, only infrastructure is good. In my college, we have 2 boys hostels, 1 girl hostel, and 1 academic building with an area of 10 acres. We have 1 ground for cricket, 1 badminton court, and volleyball court. Basketball ground is not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Civil Engineering with Computer Application - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I am very satisfied because at this fee, you can't get anything better elsewhere.

content.Placements: Around 40 to 50% of students got placed in my branch. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are MRF Tyres, Udemy, etc. Students have to find internships off-campus in any renowned company. In my course, all roles of a civil engineer, like site engineer, town planning, and surveying, are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. It's one of the best infrastructure colleges in Bihar. Classes are very big, having smart boards and CCTVs everywhere. Hostel rooms provide a good study environment with Wi-Fi facilities. Labs are well-maintained with all necessary equipment. The quality of food is overall good in our mess and canteen. There's a playground on campus where we can play lots of sports like badminton, football, volleyball, etc.

There are very few companies visiting the campus for direct recruitment. Some students secure jobs through off-campus placements. The highest package ranges between 5-7 LPA. The average package ranges between 3-4 LPA. The official placements are between 25-30%. As many students prefer to prepare for Gate, UPSC, and other plans after graduation, many students opt for higher studies like M.Tech, MBA etc. Overall, the placement rating is 4/10.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An average infrastructure campus college, good sports facilities, and lab facilities.

content.Placements: 10-15% of students are selected for placements in every batch. The highest package is 20 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA. 5-10% of students get internships. Byjus, Swiggy, and HCL are recruiting companies. Salemen, marketing, employee, etc., roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average on our college campus. There aren't many buildings on the college campus. There are limited classrooms and a cabinet for every faculty in a permanent post. If we talk about the hostel facility, I am personally rating 5/5. There are two types of rooms, single room and 3 person room. There is a personal desk, study table, table drawer, and wardrobe for each student. We have well-fitted rooms. There is a lift. We have an average mess for the food service. 12 Wi-Fi connections are there on every floor. We have one cricket ground, 2 separate badminton courts, 2 volleyball courts, and 4 table tennis boards. Every indoor game is provided. Every instrument for sports and games is provided.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: College of Agriculture, Hassan - University of Agricultural Sciences, Bangalore offers various programmes at UG level. Students can choose offline courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering and Science. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech and B.Sc. The fees for College of Agriculture, Hassan - University of Agricultural Sciences, Bangalore courses range between INR 1,08,200 to 2,67,800.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement cell but the alumni group helps in procuring the jobs. The students are sent to industries for unpaid internships during their final year of the degree programme, and the placement for those depends upon the efficiency of their work in the industries.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs, library, and grounds are excellent, but there are no Wi-Fi services throughout the campus. The food in the hostel is not good, but sports are well encouraged. There are 2 blocks for the boys' hostel and they are well maintained, and 3 blocks for the girls' hostel also.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: No placements and no practical knowledge is given.

review_content.Placements: The first thing is that no private company is interested in agriculture graduates, so no placement at all. If at all there is a placement, do not expect a high salary. In our batch, no one got into any private companies. Our batchmates had no other options other than to study for their master's. They all just joined Masters.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs, library, and grounds were excellent, but there was no Wi-Fi available throughout the campus. The college was very far from the city. Even to purchase basic things, it would take a long time. The college is located somewhere in the village, which is connected to the highway. No bus would stop at the college. The food in the hostel was not good. Sports and games are encouraged on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Food Science & Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is preferable to join our college so that you can build a good career with the help of teachers.

review_content.Placements: The college will send students on unpaid internships in their fourth year. Recruitment is based on students' working efficiency. Almost 80% of students are placed. Top recruiting companies like ITC, Sula Vineyards, Akshaya Kalpa, etc., visit our campus. Campus recruitment is being taken care of for each student. Top roles offered are food quality executive officer and food inspector.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have smart boards. There are 2 boys' hostels and 3 girls' hostels. The quality of the food is good. They provide chicken every week. Eggs and bananas are given daily. The mess fee is Rs. 2,500 per month to Rs.2,800 per month.

faqs.answer: For admission to undergraduate programs, candidates from outside Karnataka and foreign candidates must apply through the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR). They have to appear for the Common Entrance Test (CUET) conducted by ICAR. Postgraduate candidates must appear for the ICAR All India Entrance Examination for Admission (AIEEA PG). PhD candidates can apply for UAS admissions through ICAR AICE-JRF/SRF.The college offers three degree programs: B.Sc. (Agri.), B.Tech. (Biotech.), and B.Tech. (Food Tech.). It has well-equipped laboratories for teaching core and allied subjects of the curriculum. The college also provides modern classrooms with electronic image projectors, well-furnished seminar halls, and an examination hall with a video surveillance system.For more information about admission eligibility and entrance exams.

reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure and faculty are good.

review_content.Placements: Our college helps every student for their placement in top companies as well as in other companies. Our TPO, Principal & Vice-principal also help us in every step as to how to clear the interview. Till now 30-40% of students have got placed in companies like Godrej, TCS, Sanky Solutions, Telge Projects, Homelane, etc. The highest package offered was 8.0 LPA and the lowest was 3.2 LPA and the average package is between 4.0 to 4.5 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is spread over 5 km of land. There are 9-10 Wi-Fi routers for students on every floor. Classrooms are huge and very clean. The teaching board is also good.

description: Shivajirao S. Jondhale College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 is out for admission to MBA course. Jondhale College of Engineering and Technology MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs for various rounds and categories. More exam-related updates are below:

Shivajirao S. Jondhale College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 248018 and 481433 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 248018, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 274643.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 248018.

Jondhale College of Engineering and Technology MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. individual_reviews.title: Short review about SKFGI.

content.Placements: In my stream, our batch is the first batch. Internships are provided to all students in the batch. Top companies do come to the college, but mostly placements are in average tech companies.
content.Infrastructure: College library and labs are good. Classrooms are spacious. Wi-Fi connection is poor. A huge amount of books are available in the library, which are barely accessible. Labs have computers, which do their job but sometimes they even crash.
content.Faculty: Good faculty members with proper knowledge about the course. Most of the faculty members are friendly and helpful. Except some who are not that friendly and see teaching only as their job, not a method of helping students learn. HODs are good and helpful.

admission_process.title: Supreme Knowledge Foundation Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Supreme Knowledge Foundation admissionsare completely entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at SKFG is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Supreme Knowledge Foundation Application Process 2025

The application mode is online or offline. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://www.skf.edu.in/admission-process.php. However, students looking for offline applications must visit the institute to collect the application form. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

The institute considers various entrance exam scores, such as GATE, JEE Main, etc, for admission to MTech, BTech, among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for the final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once the selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat, candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSupreme Knowledge Foundation feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

college_info.intro:
Though Prestige Institute of Management & Research (PIMR Bhopal) offers a range of UG and PG courses across the Engineering, Management, Pharmacy, etc. streams its most popular courses are its MBA, MTech, and BTech courses being the institute's flagship. PIMR offers a full-time, two-year MBA programme at the PG level. The PIMR Bhopal MBA programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of Marketing, HR, Business Analytics, and others.
While the Prestige Institute of Management & Research BTech programme is offered for a duration of four-years programme and is highly sought-after with the programme imparting instruction in over 8 specialisations with each providing ample opportunities, hands-on training, and skill development to students. Students are also able to further pursue their education after BE/Tech with the PIMR Bhopal MTech programme
The campus infrastructure is designed to support the academic growth of students with specialised labs for the above programmes. Below-mentioned are a few other Prestige Institute of Management & Research Bhopal popular programmes:

review_summary.college_name: Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a decent engineering college.

content.Placements: Placements were decent. Top recruiting companies were TCS, Accenture, Wipro, and Infosys. The average salary package offered was 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: It was a private engineering college. The infrastructure was very good. All facilities were available. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Our campus had greenery all around. Hostels were well furnished. The food served in the mess was average. Classrooms were spacious.
content.Faculty: Teachers were average. The course curriculum was not updated. They did not provide practical knowledge to students. Teachers were very supportive. They also provided notes and materials during exams. Semester exams were easy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied of faculty, good placement in all years.

content.Placements: Best placement support provided by college, because of training and placement cell. They help students by a lot of things. Like they work on student communication skills, programming skill and all which help students to get placed easily. And it's my personal experience, because I got placement in my 7th semester.
content.Infrastructure: Best infrastructure for the all courses, there are best teachers which always guide you for your better future. They behave like your friends, and education system of this college is too good. Classes scheduled on 5 days in a week for 10am-4pm. And it has also best hostel, students easily and happily stay there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Average but Good college in Bhopal.

content.Placements: Approximately 70% students are placed every year in different companies from our college. But most of the students placed from my Branch and the highest salary package 9 LPA of my senior. Average package goes to 3.5 LPA and the lowest 2.8 or 3 LPA. Since I've finished my last placement exam it's was awesome, most of the time the campus test very easy if you want to crack. I love coding and the best part it is of my course. If we talked about internship then sorry to say but you have to do internship by paying thousand of rupees outside in different local company and in our college you can only revision at T&P time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college.

content.Placements: Yes campus come in college but the average packages. And 50% selection in our college in the industry. Our Senior batch approximately 70 % placed in company's. There is no internship with other companies. I am visit only 2 companies. Students role is improve ypur self.
content.Infrastructure: There are everything in our college but it's not updated in current situation. We need to smart classes. Class room is good. And canteen is average. Yes we are facing some issues in our college management. Yes Wi-Fi is available. And library also but old books are available in library. Sports are play.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a good institute, but not excellent.

content.Placements: Nowadays, rare recruitment opportunities are available for students in their desired profession. No big companies related to engineering background visit the college to recruit students. Many companies came to hire students in the previous years, but due to the increase in unemployment or decrease in the level of education in MP, companies are not visiting the college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure developed in the college is average. There are many courses offered such as engineering, diploma, B.Ed, and D.Ed. Sports facilities are also available for students for our all-round development.

admission_overview.description: Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal, admission is entirely merit-based. Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal is a private institute located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The institute is affiliated with Rajiv Gandhi Technological University and Barkatullah University, Bhopal. Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal, offers UG and PG courses across Management, Pharmacy, Engineering, Education, and others. MBA, MTech, and BTech are the flagship courses offered to the students. The institute has partnered with IIT Ropar. PIMR offers a minor certificate and degree from IIT Ropar and MASAI. Interested students can apply online. Read the article to know more about PIMR Bhopal admission 2026.

admission_process.title: Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: The admission process forPrestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopalis merit based and starts with an online application process. Fill the application form available on the official PIMR website by providing the required data. Find below the step-wise explanation of the admission process for the college:
Application:Apply through the official PIMR website by filling the application form available online.

Release of Merit list: After the declaration of entrance exam/Board Exam results, the concerned authority conducts the centralised counselling for all candidates. The candidates will be called for counselling as per the rank of the candidates in the merit list.
Document Verification: The admission will be followed by the document verification, filling of the course and college choice, seat allotment and payment of counselling fee.

Allotment of Seats: The seats will be allotted according to the candidate’s rank, filled choices and availability of seats. Candidates will have to report to the allotted college for admission after the allotment of seats.

paragraphs: Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal has a Placement team that provides placement assistance to all of its students. The placement process at Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students. Students are put through a series of workshops, guest lectures, seminars and simulation exercises to become ready to meet the ever changing corporate challenges.

Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal has concluded the placements for the batch that passed out in 2024. As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal placements 2024 stood at INR 11.40 LPA and INR 5.2 LPA, respectively. Further, the highest number of students placed in a single drive stood at 33. The top recruiters of Prestige Institute of Management & Research, Bhopal include Aditya Birla Group, Fullerton India, HDFC Bank, Parle, Reliance, Red FM 93.5, Kotak Mahindra, Dainik Bhaskar. Sundaram Mutual, Mahindra, Welspun , etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent engineering college.
reviews.review_text: It was a private engineering college. The infrastructure was very good. All facilities were available. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Our campus had greenery all around. Hostels were well furnished. The food served in the mess was average. Classrooms were spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied of faculty, good placement in all years.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure for the all courses, there are best teachers which always guide you for your better future. They behave like your friends, and education system of this college is too good. Classes scheduled on 5 days in a week for 10am-4pm. And it has also best hostel, students easily and happily stay there.

reviews.review_heading: Average but Good college in Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The classroom and Labs of our college is good, Wi-Fi is not available. Library is nice you can issue any book qny time. As I live before in the hostel, the hostel life is very bad. I've never know about medical facility. Every year games and sports events done by my college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: There are everything in our college but it's not updated in current situation. We need to smart classes. Class room is good. And canteen is average. Yes we are facing some issues in our college management. Yes Wi-Fi is available. And library also but old books are available in library. Sports are play.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good institute, but not excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure developed in the college is average. There are many courses offered such as engineering, diploma, B.Ed, and D.Ed. Sports facilities are also available for students for our all-round development.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to learn engineering go to the Trinity campus.
reviews.review_text: The college undoubtedly looks like a White House all classrooms are provided with Asus projectors and Wi-Fi as well lets especially the mechanical lab and electronics and communication lab all are instrument and machines. Our lab session was regular the box office also available on the campus student can attended and anytime and any work for your minor and major project computer lab was also very good and upgraded.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college faculty and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a lot of facilities like Wi-Fi, LAN, digital library, and a playground. Some digital seminar halls are available to present seminars. A digital presentation hall is also available. The mechanical and electronics labs are good. A huge hall with an induction motor is available. All labs are very safe. Classrooms are peaceful as the college is far from the city. Food provided in the hostels is above average. Good facilities are provided. A canteen also is available. I have good...

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the cheapest behaviour of the whole campus staff, chairman, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on the campus is good like aesthetic appearance is the blemish. The computer labs are big and more in number than the other colleges. In the library, we must continue to study in the peaceful atmosphere. There is a big playground for cricket, football, etc. The annual function is organised every year on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Pathetic college in terms of the placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. There is always construction going on in the college. The tech labs are also well-equipped, but they are not updated ones. The classrooms are spacious and proper seating arrangements are available. They have ground for playing cricket, volleyball, badminton and basketball in the college.

reviews.review_heading: My college has satisfying faculty, good placements and really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available are well-maintained classrooms and labs, Wi-Fi facilities and all the books of national and international writers are also available. There are also medical facilities provided to the students. In college,  sports and games like cricket, badminton, volleyball, tennis, billiards, carrom are also available. The quality of labs and classrooms are neat, clean and well maintained. The food provided in our canteen is somehow better. The rooms are not available in the hostel, b...

reviews.review_heading: The truth about the college from my side of view.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all basic facilities like Wi-Fi, library, sports centre, etc. The classrooms are not so good like there are no smart-class facilities, etc. Our college has separate hostels for both boys and girls, and the monthly charge is about 5k approximately.

reviews.review_heading: Quite satisfied with the faculty and dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in our college is somehow better. There are all facilities available in our college like Wi-Fi, well-maintained labs. Almost all the books are available in our college of the national or international writer. Sports are also available in our college like badminton, chess, football, cricket, volleyball, table tennis, etc. The medical facilities are also available. The quality of food available in the canteen is somehow better. The hostel facilities are not available in our...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college regarding faculty, fee structure and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this institute is fairly good. Including a big central library and a small library, which includes all essential books regarding our courses. Fully and fast Wi-Fi enabled campus. Allows students to research on their project further. Classrooms are big and accommodate children according to our needs. One of the biggest Computer labs in BHOPAL. having a total of 3 Computer labs, 2 Chemistry labs, 4 Electrical labs, 2 Civil and Mechanical labs. This college has its very own re...

reviews.review_heading: Trinity College Bhopal - Best college for engineering in Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also good in this college. You will find every thing which you would like to have in your college. All the amenities are up to the mark. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The library contains a really nice collection of books and ebooks are also available in the library. Extracurricular activities like sports are held to enhance student's progress in every field. Here you will find updated labs which are well-developed and maintained. A canteen is also available at the cam...

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend this college to everyone.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility was good enough to keep all the students in loop. Labs, classrooms and library, all was provided by the college. Medical facilities were very much taken care of and sports events were conducted every month. Labs were updated with best of equipment and technology. The quality of food was of high edible standards.

reviews_list.review_title: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.

review_content.Placements: The bulk of hiring comes from mass recruiters like TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, and Infosys. If you have decent grades (no backlogs) and basic coding skills, you will likely get placed in one of these. The college does not hand hold you for internships. You have to be proactive and find them yourself, though they might help with the paperwork.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, active campus life, and decent placements with growth.

review_content.Placements: Around 85% students got placed. The highest package is 18 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture. About 70% got internships. Roles offered are Software Engineer, Analyst, and Developer, good for the students who have come.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure. Mess food is hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities are provided wifiij.

review_summary.college_name: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is best for study, placement and facilities aur also good.

content.Placements: There are 90% of students who were placed in the B.Tech course this year. The highest package is 40 LPA, and the lowest package is 6 LPA in top companies like Swaraj, Mahindra, and Robbins.
content.Infrastructure: This is the best university in Dehradun, and the facilities are very good. The infrastructure of the college is good, with a 24-hour library, very good labs, classrooms, and facilities. Teaching quality is also very good, with approximately 6-7 years of experience. The hostel is also good, with very good rooms and food. Every year, they organise sports tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and facilities.

content.Placements: I will complete B.Tech in Computer Science (2025-2029). Around 75-80% students are placed. The highest package is about 20 LPA, the lowest 3 LPA, and the average is 6-7 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture. About 60% got internships as developers or analysts.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, good Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities, decent food in the mess and canteen. Medical support on campus, and good sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.

content.Placements: The bulk of hiring comes from mass recruiters like TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, and Infosys. If you have decent grades (no backlogs) and basic coding skills, you will likely get placed in one of these. The college does not hand hold you for internships. You have to be proactive and find them yourself, though they might help with the paperwork.
content.Infrastructure: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, active campus life, and decent placements with growth.

content.Placements: Around 85% students got placed. The highest package is 18 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Accenture. About 70% got internships. Roles offered are Software Engineer, Analyst, and Developer, good for the students who have come.
content.Infrastructure: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure. Mess food is hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities are provided wifiij.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: More focus on social media and digital marketing.

content.Placements: The CEO of my college is around 30 to 40% per year, depending on their strength and the skills they have gained during the academic sessions. With the help of psychology and extracurricular activities, they have secured placements in very reputable companies.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, the infrastructure is very well-furnished, and their main focus is on theoretical knowledge, similar to what we experience in regular schools. There is a lack of sports infrastructure, which is something a student should have to relieve mental stress during their studying period.

admission_overview.college_name: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Admission 2025: Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Selection and Application form

admission_process.title: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University admission 2025is conducted in both online and offline modes. Candidates near the University can visit the campus and purchase the application form from the admission office. Aspirants willing to apply online must visit the University's official website. Admissions to the programmes offered atDBUUare done on a merit basis for all courses. The university shortlists the candidates based on their merit in the qualifying exam. Students seeking to get admission to the courses offered at the university can refer to the following article to learn the detailedadmission procedure for Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University.

TheDBUU admission criteriaare merit-based for most of its courses. Candidates willing to take admission can apply online or offline. Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University offers more than thirty undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral and diploma courses. The university accepts students for its BAMS programme based on NEET scores. The courses are offered via its ten constituent schools in different streams such as Nursing,Engineeringand Technology, Arts,Commerce, etc. Interested candidates can check out the table below for topDBBU courses:

TheDev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University admission processis a multi-step process that begins with the release of the application forms and ends with the submission of admission confirmation fees by the selected candidates. The step-wiseDBUU admission processis given below:
Step 1: DBUU Application Process 2025
The application process is conducted in online and offline modes. Interested candidates can apply for admission either by visiting the official website of the university or the college campus.
Step 2: Shortlisting of candidates
The candidates are shortlisted based on the merit secured in the qualifying exam.
Step 3: Result declaration and Admission Confirmation
The University releases a merit list on the official website. Selected candidates are required to pay the admission confirmation fees to book their seats.

faqs.question: Can I join Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions directly?
faqs.answer: YES,You can directly take admission to Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions (DBGI). The Applicant can walk directly into the campus & meet the admission counselor, who will counsel the student regarding the different courses and the eligibility criteria.The candidate must have passed the 10+2 examination or equivalent with a minimum of 45% marks in Total and also have Mathematics as a subject in the qualifying examination then it was eligible to be admission.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University?
faqs.answer: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University offers more than 30 courses at undergraduate, postgraduate, Diploma and doctoral levels. The courses are offered in multiple streams such as Nursing, Management, Engineering, Design, Science, etc. DBUU offers these courses via its ten constituent schools.Candidates can refer to the table below for DBUU school and courses offered under them:SchoolCourses OfferedSchool of Engineering and ComputingBTech, BCA, BSc, MTech, MCA and PhDSchool of Management and CommerceBBA, BCom, MBA, PhDSchool of Pharmacy and ResearchDiploma, BPharm, MPharm, PharmD, PhDSchool of Hotel ManagementDiploma, BHM, BBA, MHM, PhDSchool of Allied SciencesBSc, MSc, PhDSchool of AgricultureBSc, BTech, MScSchool of Architecture, Planning and DesignDiploma, BArch, BPlan, BDes, BSc, MPlanDev Bhoomi Medical College of Paramedical SciencesBMLT, BPT, BMRIT, BSc, BHA, MHA, MPHSchool of Journalism and Liberal ArtsBDes, BSc, BA, BFA, MA, PhDSchool of NursingGNM, BSc

faqs.question: How to apply for BPharm admission at DBUU?
faqs.answer: Dev Bhoomi University BPharm application process is conducted online and offline. To apply in the offline mode, aspirants can visit the university campus and purchase the application form. For online application, they can follow the below-given steps:Step 1:Visit the official website of the University.Step 2:Click on 'Admissions' on the taskbar of the homepage and select the 'Apply now' option from the drop-down.Step 3:On the redirected page, fill out the registration form using a valid email ID and phone number.Step 4:Log in using the credentials generated in the previous step and fill out the application form.Step 5:Pay the application fee of INR 1,500 and click on submit.

placement_data.title: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Dev Bhoomi Uttrakhand University placement cell also known as the Corporate Resource Centre plays an important role in placing students fromm all courses. So far, more than 15,500 offers have been provided to students over the years. The placement rate achieved during DBUU placements 2025 was 80%. The highest and average package recorded during the placements was INR 43 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively. Companies like Jaro Education, TCS, Intellipaat, Zscaler and many more were part of the placement season.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in MBA at Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: For Master of Business Administration, the Human Resourses/ International Buisness/Marketing and Finance are best courses in Dev Bhoomi Group Of Institution. However, Dev Bhoomi Group of Institutions offers MBA courses in various specializations such as HR, International Business, Marketing, Finance, Agri Business, Business Analytics, Family Business & Entrepreneurship. The School of Management and Commerce at Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University provides a diverse range of courses which include B.Com, BBA, and MBA highly dedicated to reshaping students into trained professionals who can serve the vital verticals of the Management system.

hostel_campus.college_name: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 22 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: This college is best for study, placement and facilities aur also good.
reviews.review_text: This is the best university in Dehradun, and the facilities are very good. The infrastructure of the college is good, with a 24-hour library, very good labs, classrooms, and facilities. Teaching quality is also very good, with approximately 6-7 years of experience. The hostel is also good, with very good rooms and food. Every year, they organise sports tournaments.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, good Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean with basic facilities, decent food in the mess and canteen. Medical support on campus, and good sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 18 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University review.
reviews.review_text: The campus looks good from the outside. The computer labs are generally functional with working systems. A common complaint is Wi-Fi: while they claim campus-wide Wi-Fi, the speed and connectivity in hostel and certain blocks can be spotty. Hostels are decent and clean enough in the budget range. I will suggest to take PG outside.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, active campus life, and decent placements with growth.
reviews.review_text: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure. Mess food is hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical support, sports grounds, and indoor games facilities are provided wifiij.

reviews.review_heading: More focus on social media and digital marketing.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the infrastructure is very well-furnished, and their main focus is on theoretical knowledge, similar to what we experience in regular schools. There is a lack of sports infrastructure, which is something a student should have to relieve mental stress during their studying period.

reviews.review_heading: College makes more interest in events and several activities. The teaching quality is good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works average many times. Labs are average. Classrooms are also good. The library is average. The facilities in the hostel are average. The food is average, and the canteen is open from 10 AM to 9 PM. The hostel provides medical support if there is a serious illness, and they also have ambulance service for students. There are many events for sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Pharmacy and Research, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: My college is budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is mainly for the HOD curriculum, and there is a lack of sports facilities. However, if you talk about studies, proper management and facilities for the students and their future, the college infrastructure is good for the students who mainly focus on academics. Nevertheless, it lacks in providing that benefit for students who focus on extracurricular activities like sports and other pursuits.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Decent infrastructure, decent campus life. Average placements.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure available for the course are decent. Wi-Fi is rather slow but okay. There is a library at the top. Classrooms contain projectors with whiteboards. Some contain smart boards. The quality of food available in the mess is not so good, but okay. There are vending machines in every hostel, so you don't have to go to the canteen. The canteen contains good quality food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 17 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: All in all, DBUU can be a good choice.
reviews.review_text: Here we are provided with two tables, as the room is a 2-seater, and you can choose the number of seats you want. There are two beds, one almirah, and an attached room with a commode and basin. The cleaners come every day to clean the room, and on Sundays, the washrooms are cleaned. The hostel with a three-seater non-attached washrooms room is 80,000, and the 2-seater with attached washrooms is 110,000 with a 5,000 registration fee. I would suggest taking a PG or rented apartment; it will cost h...

reviews.review_heading: School-like college, uniform-wala college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working anywhere in the labs. The labs are good enough for students to train for themselves, and faculty train them for the industry. Hostel food is very hygienic, but the taste of the food is not that good. The food is only good and tasty at the time of admission.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in budget, a school like college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working properly on our campus, it's not connecting well. The labs are well maintained and very good, the classrooms are very good, the capacity of students is above 100, and the library is good enough for studying. The librarian is strict about noise. Hostel food is good, but not that hygienic. Safety concerns are always at the top for food.

reviews.review_heading: MBA experience that feels practical but self-driven.
reviews.review_text: The campus is green and good, which helps when MBA work becomes hard. Classrooms are suitable for presentations and group discussions. The internet works for normal use, but is inconsistent at times. The library is decent for reference and exam preparation. Hostel life is simple and disciplined. Rooms are clean, but facilities are basic. Mess food is average and repetitive, so most students don't expect much variety. Overall, the environment is functional rather than luxurious.

reviews.review_heading: The MBA course here is more about efforts than hype.
reviews.review_text: The campus is quiet and away from the city, which helps us to focus on our studies. MBA classrooms are comfortable and suitable for presentations and group discussions. The internet is available but not always reliable for heavy work. The library is useful mainly during exams and project submissions. Hostels are basic but livable, with regular cleaning. Mess food is simple and repetitive, so many students prefer canteen food or outside options occasionally.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Architecture and Design, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 24 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students who are seeking a design course.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean. Hostel rooms are good with Wi-Fi, though there is no Wi-Fi in classrooms. Clean food is provided in the mess and canteens. Vending machines are available for late-night cravings. There is a 24/7 water and electricity supply for uninterrupted study sessions. Laundry facilities are available, and washing machines are also provided in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Dev Bhoomi School of Engineering, Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand UniversityReviewed on 20 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best emerging university in Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi does not work properly. Classrooms are like a school. The library is very brilliant in our college. In the hostel, electricity is not constant. The mess food is not hygienic, and it is average. It has average medical facilities. Doctors are also not available on time, and a doctor is not that well-qualified.

review_summary.college_name: RMD Sinhgad School of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is nice, the placements are average, and supportive staff.

content.Placements: Placements are pretty average here like other Sinhgad Colleges of Vadgaon, Narhe branch. The highest package is around 17 LPA and the average is around 4 LPA. Internships are mostly given during the 3rd year of college. Top recruiting companies recruiting are Tata Consultancy, Wipro, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College has a nice library facility. Wi-Fi is also available in the main building zone. Classrooms are pretty normal but okayish type you can get digital learning as well. Labs are available for every department including first year, they are well-maintained. Canteen and Mess are available but canteen food is better than mess food.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the course, curriculum and faculty.

content.Placements: Companies like Capgemini, TCS, Accenture, and Cognizant visited the campus for mass hiring. Some other firms like Pubmatic and JTP offered international placements. The average package ranges between 4-4.5 LPA and the highest package went significantly higher. Although, internships are not directly offered by companies on campus. The placement cell is active in conducting drives. The top roles offered are software developer, system analyst, and QA tester. There is still scope for improvement in attracting more product-based companies and offering internship opportunities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It provided good placements in 2024-25.

content.Placements: Recruiting companies for my course are Ensono, Accenture, Cognizant, Wordline, LTIMindtree, Infosys, BNY Mellon, and Pubmatic. The highest package offered is 20 LPA. The lowest package offered is 3 LPA. The average package offered is 4 LPA. The top role offered is a software developer.
content.Infrastructure: For my course, we have facilities such as Wi-Fi and a big library. There are separate classrooms for each division of all years. There are separate labs for each subject to perform their practicals. Labs are with the equipment required for doing practicals and other assignments.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Technical life at RMD Warje.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my course is nearly 85%. Tech Mahindra, John Deere, Infosys, and Accenture are the top recruiting companies. Software developer is the main role offered. The highest package is 9 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a gymkhana with sports grounds for kho-kho, kabaddi, cricket, table tennis, football, basketball, badminton, and many more. High-speed Wi-Fi is available for all students. The food in the hostel mess is decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of RMD Sinhgad technical institute campus.

content.Placements: Overall, college is good, but for placements, you have to work hard. Nearly 60 to 65% of students get placed from my branch every year. The highest package for last year was 29 LPA, the lowest was 4 LPA, and the average package is around 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the campus is good; it provides a good environment for students. It has various facilities, such as Wi-Fi, a sports ground, a gym, various labs and a library. The food served here is also decent and campus also has a medical room. Sports facilities include various outdoor sports and also indoor games.

Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.E. in Computer Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 142437 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 137433 in 2023 and 132751 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.E. in Computer Engineering demonstrated an improving trend.

RMD Sinhgad School of Engineering accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to RMD Sinhgad School of Engineering can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

hostel_campus.college_name: RMD Sinhgad School of  Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Separate wing for the foreign student in both boys and girls hostels with additional facilities for cooking and washing
Hostels have fully furnished rooms, TV, secured Wi-Fi, dining hall, sufficient number of toilets, furniture and recreation area

library.description:
The central library is enriched by 46500 books with 12000 titles of various books of all disciplines of Engineering, Management and Sciences. Along with 5000 reference books, it also has 207 national/ international periodicals and journals. The library also possesses 1300 CDs as offline databases. 
A dedicated six storey building with huge reading halls and modern amenities is allotted to the library facilities of the campus and the central library is open for 24 hours on all days in a year with the seating capacity of more than 3500.

reviews.review_heading: College is nice, the placements are average, and supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: College has a nice library facility. Wi-Fi is also available in the main building zone. Classrooms are pretty normal but okayish type you can get digital learning as well. Labs are available for every department including first year, they are well-maintained. Canteen and Mess are available but canteen food is better than mess food.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the course, curriculum and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The department has a decent and functional infrastructure. Classrooms are equipped with projectors, blackboards, and wooden benches. Each department has a seminar hall on every floor for presentations and events. There is a small departmental library along with a central library and a dedicated reading hall for the entire college. The available facilities support academic needs. Hostel facilities are average with decent mess food and basic cleanliness. Sports facilities and a medical center are ...

reviews.review_heading: It provided good placements in 2024-25.
reviews.review_text: For my course, we have facilities such as Wi-Fi and a big library. There are separate classrooms for each division of all years. There are separate labs for each subject to perform their practicals. Labs are with the equipment required for doing practicals and other assignments.

reviews.review_heading: Technical life at RMD Warje.
reviews.review_text: The college has a gymkhana with sports grounds for kho-kho, kabaddi, cricket, table tennis, football, basketball, badminton, and many more. High-speed Wi-Fi is available for all students. The food in the hostel mess is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Review of RMD Sinhgad technical institute campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is good; it provides a good environment for students. It has various facilities, such as Wi-Fi, a sports ground, a gym, various labs and a library. The food served here is also decent and campus also has a medical room. Sports facilities include various outdoor sports and also indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by events and campus but dissatisfied by faculty and placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college is good.
Classrooms and labs are good.
Wifi is available.
The library has facilities such as reference books and textbooks.
The hostel facility is available  and is a bit okay. Boys and girls have different hostels.
Hostel Mess is also available, but mess food is not good.
There is a separate sports department.

reviews.review_heading: Reviewing the Computer department of RMD Sinhgad College.
reviews.review_text: I am satisfied with the faculty and the infrastructure of the college. The college provides high-speed Wi-Fi across the campus. There is a big library and spacious classrooms. The hostel has a beautiful infrastructure with greenery everywhere. The college canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: RMD Sinhgad College is the best engineering college in Pune.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a high-speed Wi-Fi network with specific computer labs having high graphic configuration. Our college has a big library in the basement which contains a large number of course related books and research papers for your feature projects and experience.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Colleges have facilities like a big campus, big classrooms, free internet, a 24/7 library and many more. The hostel has facilities like hot water, a bed and a cupboard. Mess food is good and healthy; outside campus food is more tasty than canteen food. The college organized events called Techtonic.

reviews.review_heading: I really miss campus, and ofcourse my friends.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was attractive and well designed. Facilities available like sports couch, free Wi-Fi at computer lab, free additional courses, etc. Hostel food was average. The canteen food was good For sports like basketball, cricket, and kabbadi courts, both outdoor and indoor sports clubs are in college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are good. Benches are good. The library is good. It has various study materials. A huge reading hall is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Someone asks me about my college.
reviews.review_text: All good facilities are available with good classrooms, the college also provides facilities like lifts, Wi-Fi, and digital classrooms and the mess service is too good sometimes they offer you a free meal. The college is located in the middle of the city so the hostel is a little long but it takes only 15 mins to reach the hostel with very good surroundings. They have a free gym, library, and also playing essentials.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure and faculty members. Everything here is well maintained.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well maintained and spacious. It doesn't feel suffocating. It is good in terms of everything. The college doesn't provide Wi-Fi. Labs are well maintained. The software is also up to date.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with good placements, really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are not present on campus. There are private hostels outside the campus. The hostel mess is good, and a lot of options are available. Wi-Fi is available, and all the labs are available for students. The classrooms are good and big and have projectors, and the library is good and big.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very well recognised and reputed.
reviews.review_text: I'm a localite, so I don't live in the hostel, and I don't know much about the hostel. Our hostel rooms are very nice. I have visited with my friend who lives in a hostel once. The faculty are very helpful to us, and they nurture us to study about future scope in a particular subject. There are Wi-Fi facilities present in our college, and the quality of food is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college, best campus.

review_content.Placements: 85 percent of students got placements in companies like Dr. Reddy, Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc. Packages range from 3 LPA to 7 LPA. 70 to 80 percent of students got internships. Basically, top roles after B.Pharma include options like drug inspector, medical and pharmaceutical analyst, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is everywhere and very fast. Digital classrooms are available, and some non-AC classrooms are also there. According to hostelers, food is good in both boys’ and girls’ hostels. Medical facilities are available. Sports facilities are good, and clubs are also well managed.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Good college but Visakhapatnam college is better.

review_content.Placements: We got internship opportunities from our professors and HOD. I have done an internship in elevate labs which was online where I did tasks that needed python, SQL, and blue skills. I have done a project related to all these skills. In the 5th semester, the eligibility for campus placement requires 0 backlogs. Verizon was one company that was visited in my course. The highest package was 6 LPA, and average package was 4 LPA. Almost 60 to 70% of the students got the placements. I would like to pursue a master's degree after my degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel was good. There were four people in a room where you get your own bed, wardrobe, table, and chair. The meal quality was good, and you had it almost every day. You had a different menu. Wi-Fi was all over the campus. Library was good, and all types of books were available. There was also an e-library. Classrooms were spacious and digitally updated. Labs were spacious and had centralized AC.

faqs.question: Q: What all courses are offered by GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad?

faqs.answer: For GITAM University Hyderabad admissions, candidates need to apply for GITAM GAT exam i. e. the GITAM Admission Test. Candidates can apply by visiting the official website. The institute also accepts the scores of national/ state-level entrance exams for several courses. Moreover, the application fee to apply is INR 1,200. The documents required at the time of admission include Active mobile number and email ID, Scanned photograph in JPEG format (maximum upload size is 50 KB only), Scanned copies of Class 10 & Class 12 marksheets, Scanned copy of Bachelor's degree marksheet (if applicable), Scanned copy of master's degree marksheet (if applicable), Aadhaar Card, Hall Ticket/ Score Card of the national level test, Medical certificate, Physical fitness certificate and No objection certificate from the present employer (for part-time PhD).
faqs.question: Q: How to apply for GITAM University Hyderabad admissions?

faqs.answer: GITAM University Hyderabad admissions is entrance-based. Candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria and clear the entrance exam for admisison. Admission is through the university entrance exam and the college also accepts various entrance exam score, such as NEET, JEE Main, TS EAMCET and others. To get admisison, candidates are also required to visit the university official website to fill out the online application form.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission in GITAM University Hyderabad?

faqs.answer: Yes, it is woth to pursue GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad. The university offers scholarships to the deserving candidates. GITAM University Hyderabad is patnwered with eminent universities like Aston University, The university of Nottingham, Elon University, and others. The university is recruited with top companies like Amazon, Adobe, pwc, Cogizant, and others.
