review_summary.college_name: GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has great infrastructure and an average faculty. Placements are improving.

content.Placements: Placement rate is good. The highest package offered is 15 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3.2 LPA. The average package offered ranges from 4.5-5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Google, Amazon, Cognizant, etc., hire students. The top role offered is HR. Our college provides internship programs and hackathons to participate in, which will be helpful for students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. Good quality of facilities is provided, but it can be better in terms of food. The hostel food is not as good as it should be. It provides everything, but the taste of the food is not good. We can eat it. The college conducts sports events.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It offers a good environment and quality education. It is a bit expensive.

content.Placements: According to me, the placement ratio is somewhat less because the college is private. Some good companies from Hyderabad come and select a few students. For good students, many internship programs are available through the campus. If we do well in internships, we will get a good placement at the end of the course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in the classrooms are basic. Some of them have air-conditioners, and some of them just have normal fans. As it is a private university, we have to pay for the luxury, and the same happens in the hostel. However, everything is well-maintained and clean.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college, best campus.

content.Placements: 85 percent of students got placements in companies like Dr. Reddy, Cipla, Sun Pharma, etc. Packages range from 3 LPA to 7 LPA. 70 to 80 percent of students got internships. Basically, top roles after B.Pharma include options like drug inspector, medical and pharmaceutical analyst, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is everywhere and very fast. Digital classrooms are available, and some non-AC classrooms are also there. According to hostelers, food is good in both boys’ and girls’ hostels. Medical facilities are available. Sports facilities are good, and clubs are also well managed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good college but Visakhapatnam college is better.

content.Placements: We got internship opportunities from our professors and HOD. I have done an internship in elevate labs which was online where I did tasks that needed python, SQL, and blue skills. I have done a project related to all these skills. In the 5th semester, the eligibility for campus placement requires 0 backlogs. Verizon was one company that was visited in my course. The highest package was 6 LPA, and average package was 4 LPA. Almost 60 to 70% of the students got the placements. I would like to pursue a master's degree after my degree.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel was good. There were four people in a room where you get your own bed, wardrobe, table, and chair. The meal quality was good, and you had it almost every day. You had a different menu. Wi-Fi was all over the campus. Library was good, and all types of books were available. There was also an e-library. Classrooms were spacious and digitally updated. Labs were spacious and had centralized AC.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is good on campus because of greenery and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Top MNCs will recruit the students. Based on the students' practical knowledge, they will get a job. Last year in our college, a student got the highest package with 1 crore. Our college also offers to study abroad and to do internships abroad.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is really nice, and its hospitality is also nice. According to security purpose, it is really good for girls. Sports are also there, we can play badminton, hockey, cricket, etc. In hostel, there are carrom, chess, and gym facilities are also available.

faqs.question: What are the documents required for admission to GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: The documents required for admission to GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad are as follows:-Academic documents- Marksheets of 10th and 12th grade, bachelor's degree, and master's degree (if applicable).Identification documents- Aadhaar card, passport, driving license, voter ID card, PAN card, or school or college ID cardOther documents- Scanned photograph, medical certificate, hall ticket or score card of a national level test, physical fitness certificate (if applicable), and no objection certificate from current employer (for part-time PhD).Students are also required to pay INR 1,200 as an application fee.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for the MBA program at GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: GITAM Deemed to be the University Hyderabad has not disclosed the application fee for the MBA program. But to apply for the MBA program, the candidates are required to take the GITAM Business Aptitude Test (GBAT) or any of the following national-level entrance tests CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, or JEMAT.The MBA programme fees at GITAM Hyderabad lie between INR 1,80,000 and INR 4,97,000  The prospective students should get in touch with the university's admissions office for further details on the application fees and all other questions related to admissions.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad for admission to B.Arch.?
faqs.answer: To be accepted by GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad for admission in B.Arch students need to have the qualifying marks in the GITAM Admission Test (GAT) or the National Aptitude Test in Architecture (NATA). So that meansGAT and NATAexam scores are accepted by GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad for admission to B.Arch.Additionally, to be eligible for B.Arch admission, candidates require a minimum of 50% aggregate marks in their Intermediate (10+2) examination or a 10+3 Diploma, with Physics and Mathematics as mandatory subjects.

placement_report.college_name: GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad Campus Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package and Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad has yet to release its full 2025 placement report. However, as per the official website, the highest package offered during GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad placements 2025 was INR 1.4 Crore per annum. Additionally, a total of 334 CSE students were placed during the placement drive. The highest and average package given to CSE students during GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad placements was INR 60 LPA and INR 6.1 LPA , respectively. Further, 33 Pharmacy students were also placed in the 2025 placement drive.

Earlier in 2024, 78% ECE students were placed. In all 52 recruiters took part in the GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad placements 2024 and extended 42 offers to ECE students. The highest and average package recorded for ECE during the 2024 placements were INR 9.1 LPA and INR 4 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing M.A. from GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: There are many job opportunities after doing an M.A. from GITAM Deemed to be University Hyderabad you can be a teacher or assistant professor at a college or university or you can pursue your career as a journalist or in public relations. You can also work as a social services specialist to design programs and policies to help people with problems like homelessness, addiction, and poverty. You can be a practitioner in the social science discipline of economics or even a psychologist. Civil services are one of the most common career options after completing an M.A.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is everywhere and very fast. Digital classrooms are available, and some non-AC classrooms are also there. According to hostelers, food is good in both boys’ and girls’ hostels. Medical facilities are available. Sports facilities are good, and clubs are also well managed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 23 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college but Visakhapatnam college is better.
reviews.review_text: Hostel was good. There were four people in a room where you get your own bed, wardrobe, table, and chair. The meal quality was good, and you had it almost every day. You had a different menu. Wi-Fi was all over the campus. Library was good, and all types of books were available. There was also an e-library. Classrooms were spacious and digitally updated. Labs were spacious and had centralized AC.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is good on campus because of greenery and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is really nice, and its hospitality is also nice. According to security purpose, it is really good for girls. Sports are also there, we can play badminton, hockey, cricket, etc. In hostel, there are carrom, chess, and gym facilities are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 8 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available here is far better compared to other universities. Here, the rooms are neatly maintained with workers cleaning every day. All the classrooms, library, mess, and all are maintained with air conditioning and everyday cleaning.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 7 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available here is far better compared to other universities. The rooms are neatly maintained with workers cleaning every day. All the classrooms, library, and mess are maintained with air conditioning and cleaned daily.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by GITAM School of Business, HyderabadReviewed on 3 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with campus and faculty, good placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Gitam offers Wi-Fi enabled classrooms known as smart classrooms. Classrooms, well equipped labs, and a central library with digital resources. Hostels are comfortable with Wi-Fi, the mess provides decent food, canteens add variety, and facilities include medical care.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 22 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: GITAM has a holistic kind of environment where students can study stress free.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities available in our campus, including Wi-Fi, computer labs, Library, playgrounds, and clubs. The facilities at the hostel are too good, including sports facilities, a gym, a medical room, a hostel library, and nicely furnished rooms. The quality of food is good in our hostel canteens.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 21 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: 2025 GITAM Hyderabad CSE review.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, AC classrooms for university courses, and a vast library with thousands of books available for reading.  The hostel is good, but a little on the expensive side. The food is good in college hostels compared to other colleges. Canteen food is also delicious. A sports ground is available for playing.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 16 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, really good infrastructure with well-maintained equipment.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in my college are really good and well-maintained. We are provided with all the required things for our course. We have well-working Wi-Fi, AC classrooms with projectors, AI, and 360 degree cameras for better monitoring of students. The food in our college is the best. We have many varieties of food, and they are hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 16 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of GITAM University, Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. All department course infrastructure is good. The college provides Wi-Fi 24 hours a day. Labs are advanced. Classrooms are good. The library is very big and has all types of books. The hostel is good. Food is decent. In college, there are 3 canteens. Good facilities for medical and sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 29 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Balanced experience: Decent teaching, good events, and scope for industry upgrades.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. We have well-equipped labs, reliable Wi-Fi, clean classrooms, and library with good collection of books. Hostel rooms are neat and maintained regularly. Mess food has variety dishes with good taste. Sports facilities include a box cricket, indoor games. Basic medical help is available all time.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 5 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All over good faculty members, average placements, good infrastructure, and bad food in hostel.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good. Labs are fabulous. Classrooms are good, few are AC and few are non-AC. Wi-Fi is the issue nearby. Hostel is worse. Non taste food, common washrooms, no games, and medical is okay. The mess and canteen should improve a lot.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by GITAM School of Technology, HyderabadReviewed on 2 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My review of GITAM Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are well-equipped with Wi-Fi routers, projectors, and smart CCTV cameras with AI detection technology to detect cheating in exams. The library is 3-floored and has almost everything we will need for our studies. It also has a separate workplace for digital work. The hostel is a bit expensive but good. It is comfortable with regular cleaning and attentive staff members. Mess food is relatively much better than other private colleges with delicious and a vast variety of meals. Howev...

college_info.college_name: GITAM Deemed to be University - Hyderabad Campus Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, GITAM University Hyderabad offers scholarship to deserving and meritorious students. The below-mentioned are the scholarships offered by GITAM University Hyderabad:

BTech fee at GITAM Deemed to be University, Hyderabad generally includes tuition fee, hostel deposit, security deposit and other applicable charges, with exact amounts varying by programme and choices such as accommodation.
BTech fee at GITAM Deemed to be University, Hyderabad is between INR 5.5 Lacs to INR 16.47 Lacs for full course duration, depending on the specialisation chosen in this course.

The application fees for the GITAM University Hyderabad is INR 1200 for UG and PG courses. The application process is online. Ensure that the eligibility criteria is met and the accepted entrance exams are passed for admissions to the university.
